AI.conclusion: 将原子动作合成为SOP是实现自进化代理的可扩展路径，迭代工具优化有助于形成稳定高效的工具使用模式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域存在大量重复性处理流程（如大气校正-地理配准-植被指数计算、多时相影像拼接-归一化-分类），可将这些原子步骤合成为遥感专用SOP。具体方案：(1) 从历史遥感处理日志中提取常见操作序列；(2) EvoSOP自动构建影像预处理SOP、变化检测流程SOP等；(3) 通过合并相似SOP减少冗余；(4) 评估SOP在不同遥感任务上的泛化性能并剪枝低效流程。这将大幅降低遥感大模型代理的交互轮次和错误率。

title: Gen4U: Unifying Video Generation and Understanding via Diffusion
summary: Prior work suggests that diffusion representations capture low-level geometry but struggle with high-level semantics. We demonstrate that state-of-the-art video diffusion models overcome this limitation. By systematically probing their intermediate activations using recent mutual-kNN alignment metrics, we reveal a highly structured latent space where visual representations evolve across both network depth and noise levels. We show that while moderate noise levels yield linearly separable global semantics, fine-grained details persist at lower noise levels but become spatially scattered, requiring attention mechanisms to decode. Building on these insights, we introduce Gen4U (Generation for Understanding), a framework that repurposes these generative representations with a single forward pass. Our experiments establish that frozen, large-scale video diffusion models function as highly competitive video encoders across a wide spectrum of tasks, spanning semantic and non-semantic objectives (video classification, depth estimation, camera pose estimation, image and video captioning). Bypassing fine-tuning, Gen4U unifies the generation and understanding paradigms, achieving strong perception performance while fully preserving the model's ability to generate high-quality video.

AI.tldr: 本文证明大规模视频扩散模型不仅能生成高质量视频，其中间表征也具备强大的高语义理解能力。作者提出Gen4U框架，通过单次前向传播即可复用这些生成式表征，在视频分类、深度估计、相机姿态估计、图像/视频字幕等任务上达到极具竞争力的性能，无需微调即可统一生成与理解范式。
AI.motivation: 先前工作认为扩散表征只能捕捉低级几何信息，难以表达高级语义。作者试图验证当前最先进的视频扩散模型是否突破了这一局限，并探索如何在不微调的情况下直接利用其表征服务于多种下游理解任务。
AI.method: 1) 使用互k近邻对齐指标系统性地探测视频扩散模型的中间激活，分析表征随网络深度和噪声水平的结构化演化规律；2) 提出Gen4U框架，通过单次前向传播冻结的视频扩散模型，直接提取其表征用于多种感知任务，无需任何微调。
AI.result: 中等噪声水平下可获得线性可分的全局语义，低噪声水平下细粒度细节仍然存在但空间上分散，需注意力机制解码。Gen4U在视频分类、深度估计、相机姿态估计、图像和视频字幕等语义与非语义任务上均取得强竞争力表现。
AI.conclusion: 大规模视频扩散模型的生成表征统一了生成与理解两大范式，在完全保留生成能力的同时实现了优异的感知性能，为视觉基础模型的发展提供了新路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域可借鉴Gen4U的思路，利用预训练的视频扩散模型（如处理遥感视频或时序影像）直接提取特征，用于场景分类、变化检测、深度估计（如DSM生成）、相机位姿估计（如无人机平台）等任务。具体方案：1) 将遥感视频帧或时序多光谱影像输入冻结的视频扩散模型，提取不同噪声水平下的中间层表征，利用注意力机制解码细粒度地物边界信息；2) 针对遥感数据标注稀缺的问题，利用Gen4U的无微调特性直接在少量样本上完成下游任务适配；3) 探索视频扩散模型对多视角遥感影像（如卫星序列）的表征能力，服务于三维重建与正射校正。

title: Physics-Audited Agentic Discovery in Scientific Machine Learning
summary: In agentic scientific machine learning (SciML), large language model (LLM) agents can discover surrogate models and select one by an automated score, typically an error metric. A low error, however, does not establish that the predicted fields satisfy the physics that matter for mechanics, such as boundary conditions, superposition, stiffness scaling, or causality. We introduce Physics-Audited Agentic SciML (PA-SciML), a verification-first workflow for agentic SciML discovery. The workflow fixes a scoring evaluator before search, derives reviewable machine-checkable physics requirements, checks each trained candidate on its outputs, and separately searches prescribed input ranges or measured load-history spans for high-violation cases without reference solution fields. A surrogate is reported as verified only under the stated checks. When enabled, the workflow also adds advisory numerical probes before training and tests one modeling change at a time to record which isolated edits are associated with score gains before reuse. In the reported computational-solid-mechanics numerical examples, the static elasticity run selects a surrogate with lower validation error than the error-only baseline while both selected models pass the common linear-elastic checks. In the transient elastodynamics run, an error-only baseline with similar mean error fails a stricter causality check by responding to future parts of the loading history, while the selected surrogate passes the stated checks. The main distinction is per-candidate physics evidence on predicted fields, not a richer aggregate score.

AI.tldr: 提出PA-SciML框架，在智能体科学机器学习中加入物理审计步骤，确保所选代理模型不仅误差低，而且满足边界条件、因果性等物理约束。在固体力学算例中，该框架能选出通过物理检验的模型，而纯误差基线可能违反因果性等物理要求。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体科学机器学习仅依赖误差指标选择代理模型，但低误差并不能保证预测场满足力学中重要的物理约束（如边界条件、叠加原理、刚度缩放、因果性），导致可能选出物理上不合理但误差低的模型。
AI.method: PA-SciML采用验证优先的工作流：在搜索前固定评分评估器，推导可审查的机器可检查的物理需求，对每个候选模型的输出进行物理检验，并在无参考解的情况下搜索高违规案例。同时包含训练前的数值探针和单变量编辑测试机制。
AI.result: 静态弹性算例中，PA-SciML选出的模型验证误差低于纯误差基线，且两者均通过线性弹性检验；瞬态弹性动力学算例中，纯误差基线虽误差相近但未能通过严格的因果性检验（对未来载荷历史有响应），而PA-SciML选出的模型通过了所有物理检验。
AI.conclusion: PA-SciML的主要优势在于对每个候选模型的预测场进行逐一的物理证据审计，而非依赖于更丰富的聚合评分，从而确保模型在物理上可信。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域广泛使用代理模型（如替代物理过程的机器学习模型），该框架可直接用于遥感正向模型选择（如辐射传输模型替代）和反演代理模型的验证，确保预测场满足遥感物理约束（如辐射平衡、大气传输方程、时空连续性、边界辐射条件）。具体方案：(1) 在遥感代理模型搜索中加入物理审计项，如能量守恒、大气辐射传输方程残差、地物光谱约束；(2) 针对遥感多尺度特性，设计尺度一致的物理检验规则；(3) 利用数值探针在不依赖真值的情况下检测高违规场景，适用于缺乏实地观测数据的遥感问题。

title: Geometric Collapse: When Vision Models Fail to Verify Physical Causality
summary: Recent progress in large-scale self-supervised learning has improved dense geometric prediction, but it remains unclear whether such scaling yields inference-time physical plausibility checks. We propose Scrambled Edges, a controlled counterfactual that injects salient edge-like cues while violating surface continuity, illumination coherence, and occlusion ordering. With energy-matched and structure-matched controls, we isolate the effect of unsupported edge evidence from high-frequency energy and edge sparsity. Across CNN/ViT/SSL depth predictors on NYU Depth v2 and KITTI, Scrambled Edges induce up to 3.2x larger deviation from clean predictions than energy-matched noise; additional diffusion and flow-matching depth estimators show attenuated but still significant collapse. The resulting Geometric Collapse propagates globally: even with oracle knowledge of the corrupted region, output-level repair recovers only 47%, with substantial error outside the mask. These findings provide controlled behavioral evidence that current dense predictors lack reliable mechanisms to quarantine physically unsupported edge cues, motivating explicit plausibility scoring and selective cue integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“Scrambled Edges”——一种受控反事实扰动方法，通过在图像中注入看似合理但违反物理规则（表面连续性、光照一致性、遮挡顺序）的边缘线索，系统评估深度预测模型在推理时对物理合理性的检查能力。实验表明，当前CNN/ViT/SSL等深度预测模型在面对这类扰动时，预测结果会产生显著偏差（最高达3.2倍），且该“几何崩塌”会全局传播，即使已知掩码区域也无法完全恢复，证明现有模型缺乏隔离物理不合理边缘线索的可靠机制。
AI.motivation: 大规模自监督学习的进展提升了几何密集预测性能，但模型在推理时是否具备物理合理性检查能力仍不明确。现有方法缺乏系统性的评估手段来检验模型对违反物理规律（如表面连续性、光照一致性、遮挡关系）的边缘线索的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计受控反事实扰动“Scrambled Edges”：注入具有边缘线索外观但违反表面连续性、光照一致性和遮挡排序的扰动。通过能量匹配和结构匹配的控制条件，分离无支撑边缘证据的影响与高频能量和边缘稀疏性的影响。在NYU Depth v2和KITTI数据集上，对CNN、ViT和SSL等深度预测器进行评估，并额外扩展到扩散模型和流匹配深度估计器。
AI.result: Scrambled Edges在深度预测中引入的偏差比能量匹配噪声高出3.2倍；扩散和流匹配模型虽有所缓解但仍有显著崩塌。即使已知扰动区域，输出级修复仅能恢复47%的精度，且掩码外区域也存在显著误差。
AI.conclusion: 当前密集预测模型缺乏有效的机制来隔离物理上不支持的边缘线索，说明需要引入显式的物理合理性评分和选择性线索整合机制。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感深度估计（如基于卫星或航拍影像的单目深度估计）同样面临物理合理性问题。具体改进方案：(1) 将Scrambled Edges作为遥感深度估计模型的鲁棒性测试基准，评估模型对建筑物边缘、地形断裂等违反表面连续性的线索的敏感性；(2) 针对遥感场景中频繁出现的遮挡关系（如树木遮挡建筑、阴影遮挡地物），设计物理合理性评分模块，结合高度场连续性和光照一致性约束进行后处理修正；(3) 在遥感深度估计训练中引入Scrambled Edges作为数据增广，提升模型对物理合理性线索的判别能力。

title: MIRA-Math: A Benchmark for Minimal Information Requesting and Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Mathematical reasoning benchmarks typically provide all facts needed to solve each problem, while interactive benchmarks often mix reasoning with tools, retrieval, and long-horizon dialogue. We introduce MIRA-Math, a benchmark for a narrower diagnostic capability: solving mathematical problems whose full latent state has a unique answer, but whose solver-facing view is missing exactly one necessary atomic fact. The solver must request the missing information in natural language under a strict budget and then integrate the returned fact into an exact final answer. A fixed constrained LLM responder sees only the dataset-provided atomic fact and must either offer the quoted fact when the request matches it, or decline otherwise. Thus, instance generation, typed hint specifications, validation, and final-answer verification are deterministic, while request metrics are measured under a fixed LLM-mediated responder channel. MIRA-Math contains 2{,}310 generated instances from 22 typed mathematical families spanning algebra, probability, linear systems, discrete structures, signal processing, Markov chains, circuits, interpolation, and numerical boundary-value problems. Experiments across frontier and small models show that request success and final-answer accuracy are separable: models may ask for the right fact yet fail the downstream computation, or fail before obtaining the canonical hint. We release generators, verifiers, prompts, run metadata, and dataset documentation to support reproducible evaluation of minimal information requesting in mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: MIRA-Math是一个数学推理基准，专门测试模型在缺少一个关键原子事实时，能否通过自然语言请求获取缺失信息并完成精确计算。包含2,310个实例，覆盖22种数学类型。实验表明请求成功与最终答案准确率是可分离的。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理基准要么提供全部所需事实，要么将推理与工具、检索混合。缺乏一个专注于诊断性能力的基准：模型在缺少且仅缺少一个必要的原子事实时，能否主动请求缺失信息并完成推理。
AI.method: 构建MIRA-Math基准：每个问题在求解视角下恰好缺少一个原子事实，模型需在预算内用自然语言请求缺失信息，并由固定LLM响应器提供或拒绝该事实。实例生成、提示说明、验证和最终答案检查均为确定性流程。包含22种数学类型（代数、概率、线性系统、离散结构、信号处理、马尔可夫链、电路、插值、数值边值问题等）的2,310个生成实例。
AI.result: 前沿模型和小模型的实验表明：请求成功率和最终答案正确率是可分离的——模型可能正确请求了缺失事实但后续计算失败，也可能在获取标准提示前就已失败。
AI.conclusion: MIRA-Math提供了可复现的数学推理中最小信息请求能力评估框架。发布了生成器、验证器、提示、运行元数据和数据集文档。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域常见问题如参数反演、几何校正等往往依赖于缺失的现场测量数据或先验知识。可构建类似框架：每个遥感问题隐藏一个关键参数（如大气校正系数、地表反射率参考值），模型需主动向数据库或专家系统请求该缺失信息。这能评估遥感AI模型在数据不完整条件下的主动信息获取与推理能力，可用于遥感智能解译系统的诊断性测试。

title: Ensemble Deep Learning Approaches for AI-Altered Video Detection
summary: The increasing accessibility of artificial intelligence has led to a rapid rise in AI-generated videos, making it more difficult to distinguish between real and manipulated content. Many existing detection methods rely on a single model and often struggle to generalize across different types of deepfakes. In this work, we developed a multimodal deepfake detection system that combines both audio and visual analysis using an ensemble of models. The system includes AASIST for audio-based detection, and EfficientNet, XceptionNet, and MesoNet for analyzing visual features in video frames. The pipeline takes a video as input, separates the audio, and extracts face frames using MTCNN. Each model produces a score indicating the likelihood of the input being fake. These scores are then combined using ensemble strategies, including mean averaging and stacking. Mean fusion provides a simple and stable baseline, while stacking uses a trained meta-model to learn how to combine predictions more effectively. Results show that while individual models perform well on the datasets they were trained on, their performance drops when tested on more diverse datasets. The ensemble approach helps improve overall robustness by combining predictions from multiple models, leading to more consistent performance across different types of deepfakes. This suggests that using both audio and visual information together is a more reliable approach for deepfake detection. Our results highlight generalization to unseen manipulations as the central open challenge, with average accuracy around 70%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态深度伪造检测系统，融合音频（AASIST）和视觉（EfficientNet、XceptionNet、MesoNet）特征，采用均值融合与堆叠集成策略。结果表明集成方法提升了鲁棒性，但跨数据集泛化仍是主要挑战，平均准确率约70%。
AI.motivation: AI生成视频激增导致真假难辨，现有单模型检测方法难以泛化到不同类型的深度伪造内容，亟需更鲁棒的检测方案。
AI.method: 构建多模态集成检测系统：音频分支使用AASIST，视觉分支使用EfficientNet、XceptionNet和MesoNet；输入视频后通过MTCNN提取人脸帧，各模型输出伪造概率分数，再采用均值融合和堆叠（元学习器）两种集成策略组合预测结果。
AI.result: 单个模型在训练数据集上表现良好，但在多样化数据集上性能下降；集成方法显著提升了跨类型深度伪造的鲁棒性和一致性；整体平均准确率约为70%，泛化到未见过的篡改类型仍是核心难题。
AI.conclusion: 音频与视觉信息联合使用是更可靠的深度伪造检测方案，集成学习有效提升模型鲁棒性，但跨数据集泛化能力仍存在明显瓶颈，是未来需要突破的关键方向。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临多模态数据（如光学与SAR图像）的伪造/篡改检测问题。可直接将该系统的多模态集成框架迁移至遥感伪造检测：音频分支替换为SAR信号处理模块或光谱分析分支，视觉分支可引入ResNet、Swin Transformer等更强骨干网络，MTCNN替换为遥感目标检测器（如YOLO-Remote），集成策略的均值融合与堆叠机制保持不变，用于检测遥感图像拼接、GAN生成等伪造行为。

title: Agentic Data Environments
summary:
Autonomous agents promise substantial gains in speed, scale, and labor efficiency, but their failures can impose abrupt and often irreversible costs. The central challenge for agentic automation is therefore to increase the benefits of automation while bounding the consequences of failure.
  While databases remain central to modern computing, agents operate over a broader data environment spanning files, APIs, applications, and system state. In this talk, I will outline early work on Agentic Data Environments -- the execution substrate in which agents operate -- that both amplify agent capabilities and enforce safety guarantees. This perspective reframes data systems from passive stores of state into active substrates for safe, reliable execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"智能体数据环境"概念，将数据系统从被动存储重新定义为智能体安全可靠执行的主动基板，旨在平衡自动化效益与失败风险控制。
AI.motivation: 自主智能体在提升效率的同时，其失败可能带来不可逆的成本，因此亟需一种既能增强智能体能力又能约束失败后果的执行环境。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Data Environments框架，将数据系统重构为智能体操作的主动执行基板，涵盖文件、API、应用和系统状态等更广泛的数据环境，同时在架构层面内建安全保证机制。
AI.result: 尚处于早期工作阶段，论文主要阐述概念框架和愿景，尚未给出具体的实验验证或量化结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过将数据系统从被动状态存储转变为主动执行基板，可以在增强智能体能力的同时强制执行安全保证，为解决智能体自动化的核心挑战提供新的思路。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感领域智能体（如自动解译、灾情响应）可借鉴该框架：将遥感数据平台（影像库、GIS系统、元数据目录）构建为主动执行基板，在执行解译或分析任务时内建约束机制（如地理范围校验、时相一致性检查），确保错误操作不会污染大规模遥感分析管线或触发不可逆的存储修改。

title: Video2Reaction: Mapping Video to Audience Reaction Distribution in the Wild
summary: Understanding and forecasting audience reactions to video content are crucial for improving content creation, recommendation systems, and media analysis. To enable audience reaction prediction and other content engagement applications, we introduce $\textbf{Video2Reaction}$, a multimodal dataset that maps short movie segments to a distribution of $\textit{induced emotions}$ of viewers in the wild, as expressed through social media. $\textbf{Video2Reaction}$ spans more than 10,000 videos and serves as a reliable benchmark as well as a training resource for audience reaction prediction. To enable cost-effective continuous annotations as reactions may change over time, we develop a two-stage multi-agent pipeline using only open-source LLMs, achieving 86% correctness under blind human verification despite the inherently noisy and subjective nature of the task. We establish the first benchmark for video-to-reaction-distribution prediction in the wild and show that pretrained foundation video models fail in zero-shot settings, while finetuning transforms them into state-of-the-art predictors capable of modeling both full reaction distributions and dominant responses from video alone. However, the task remains challenging: even the strongest methods achieve only 77% Top-3 F1 in dominant reaction prediction (LLaVA-Next), highlighting a substantial gap in modeling collective audience reaction. \modification{Dataset and code are available at our project page: https://information-fusion-lab-umass.github.io/video2reaction-bench.github.io

AI.tldr: 论文提出Video2Reaction数据集，包含10000+视频及其对应的观众情绪分布，用于预测观众对视频内容的集体反应。通过两阶段多智能体LLM流水线实现低成本连续标注，并建立首个野外视频到反应分布预测基准，发现预训练基础视频模型在零样本下失败，微调后可达SOTA效果，但任务仍具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏大规模、覆盖野外真实场景的观众情绪反应数据集，且连续时间维度上的情绪标注成本高昂，制约了观众反应预测及相关应用的发展。
AI.method: 1) 构建Video2Reaction多模态数据集，包含10000+短视频片段及其对应的社交媒体表达的观众诱导情绪分布；2) 提出两阶段多智能体流水线，仅使用开源LLM实现成本高效的连续时间情绪标注；3) 建立视频到反应分布预测的基准，评估预训练基础视频模型及微调后的性能。
AI.result: 两阶段多智能体流水线在盲人人工验证下达到86%正确率；最强方法（LLaVA-Next微调）在主导反应预测中仅达77% Top-3 F1，预训练模型在零样本场景下表现失败，微调后成为SOTA预测器。
AI.conclusion: 视频到观众集体反应预测任务仍然具有挑战性，现有最佳方法距离实际应用仍有显著差距，该数据集和基准为后续研究提供了可靠基础。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感领域可借鉴其多模态视频-情绪标注方法，将两阶段多智能体LLM流水线应用于遥感视频（如灾害监测、交通监控等）中的人群行为分析，自动标注视频中人群对事件的集体反应状态（如恐慌、疏散等），辅助应急响应决策。同时，Video2Reaction中视频到反应分布的预测框架可迁移用于遥感视频中人群动态行为建模。

title: Reason Less, Verify More: Deterministic Gates Recover a Silent Policy-Violation Failure Mode in Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary:
Tool-using LLM agents can violate the very policies they are deployed to enforce while appearing to complete the task successfully. In policy-permissive environments, a tool may execute any well-formed call even when the corresponding state transition is forbidden by domain policy. The result is a silent wrong state (a booking cancelled, a passenger count changed, a claim acted on without verification) that neither the tool nor the agent's self-report exposes.
  We study this failure mode in the $τ^2$-bench airline domain. On a budget agent, 78% of observed failures are silent wrong-state failures with no tool error, and the aggregate failure rate is reproducible across disjoint seeds, not sampling noise. We then evaluate a lightweight intervention: deterministic, read-only pre-execution gates that inspect the proposed call and current state before allowing a write. A four-gate suite raises full-benchmark success from 29.6% to 42.0% on gpt-4o-mini (+12.4pp; paired task-level bootstrap P=0.0012), and the lift reproduces on a disjoint 15-seed set (+12.3pp; P=0.0008).
  The effect is concentrated where the gates fire: on the 26/50 firing tasks, success rises by +19.2pp, while movement on the 24 non-firing tasks does not exclude zero. Two negative controls (a self-enforcing retail domain and BFCL) bound the mechanism: gates help when tools are policy-permissive and add little where tools already self-enforce. As suggestive evidence, not a central claim, the same failure mode persists at the frontier: gpt-5.2 at default reasoning still attempts policy-violating writes, and the same suite improves success from 61.2% to 71.6% (+10.4pp; P=0.020; n=5, no replication). The contribution is a bounded evaluation and reliability result: deterministic gates do not guarantee task success, but they can deterministically prevent a known class of silent policy-violating writes at the action boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用工具的LLM代理在策略宽松环境中会执行违反策略的静默错误（silent wrong-state failures），即工具调用本身不报错但状态已违规。在航空领域基准测试中，78%的失败源于此类错误。作者提出了一种轻量级干预方案——确定性只读预执行门控（deterministic read-only pre-execution gates），在写入前检查调用和状态。四门控套件在gpt-4o-mini上将成功率从29.6%提升至42.0%（+12.4pp，P=0.0012），在gpt-5.2上从61.2%提升至71.6%（+10.4pp，P=0.020）。该机制在工具本身具有策略自执行能力的场景中效果有限。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在调用工具时，即使工具调用语法正确，也可能违反部署环境的策略约束，导致状态 silently 出错（如取消预订、修改乘客数、未验证即处理索赔等），而工具和代理自报告均无法暴露此类错误。现有研究未充分关注此类静默策略违反的失败模式。
AI.method: 在τ²-bench航空领域基准上，设计并评估了确定性只读预执行门控机制：在工具写入前，通过只读检查（pre-execution gates）对代理的调用请求和当前状态进行策略合规性验证。采用四门控套件（four-gate suite），并对gpt-4o-mini和gpt-5.2进行实验。引入两个负对照实验（自执行零售域和BFCL）来界定机制边界。
AI.result: 在预算代理上，78%的失败为静默错误。四门控套件将gpt-4o-mini全基准成功率从29.6%提升至42.0%（+12.4pp，P=0.0012），在15种子复现集上提升+12.3pp（P=0.0008）。效果集中在门控触发的26/50任务上（+19.2pp），非触发任务无显著变化。在gpt-5.2上成功率从61.2%提升至71.6%（+10.4pp，P=0.020，n=5，未复现）。负对照实验表明门控仅在策略宽松工具环境下有效。
AI.conclusion: 确定性门控虽不能保证任务整体成功，但能在动作边界确定性阻止一类已知的静默策略违反写入操作。这是一种有界评估和可靠性结果，而非通用解决方案。同一失败模式在前沿模型gpt-5.2中依然存在，表明问题具有持续性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域常涉及地理空间数据处理的工具链（如影像检索、几何校正、分类模型调用），LLM代理在调用这些工具时可能违反数据处理策略（如越权访问敏感区域影像、未经验证即执行几何变换）。具体交叉方案：（1）将预执行门控机制引入遥感代理系统，在调用影像处理工具前检查空间范围是否越界、数据等级是否符合授权；（2）设计遥感特定的策略门控，如检查请求的地理边界是否在许可区域内、输入影像的元数据是否完整；（3）可应用于遥感任务自动化编排场景，防止LLM代理在无人工审核情况下执行高风险空间操作（如修改地理标签、删除影像记录）。

title: ReMoDEx: A Local-to-Global Relevance-Based Model Decision Explainability Framework for large-Scale Image Datasets
summary: Deep learning image classifiers achieve strong predictive performance yet remain opaque in how decisions are formed. A model may predict correctly while relying on irrelevant cues, shortcut associations, peripheral structures, or device level artifacts instead of task relevant regions. On large scale datasets this opacity is especially problematic, since inspecting heatmaps one sample at a time cannot scale to thousands of predictions. We propose Relevance Based Model Decision Explainability (ReMoDEx), a framework for systematic, dataset scale assessment of model decision behaviour in image classification. ReMoDEx defines a stepwise pipeline: model inference, target class selection, relevance map generation, heatmap standardisation, similarity based grouping of patterns, cluster level interpretation, and spatial relevance assessment. Local methods GradCAM++, Integrated Gradients, Occlusion Sensitivity, and Layerwise Relevance Propagation are each combined independently with a single global module that summarises an entire set of relevance maps into a few decision strategy clusters, replacing sample by sample inspection with an automatic, scalable summary. To demonstrate ReMoDEx, we applied it to a VGG16 based classifier distinguishing COVID-19, Normal, Lung Opacity, and Viral Pneumonia. The classifier showed stable performance (86.27% test accuracy, 0.9624 test AUC). However, each explainer combined with the global module consistently produced two recurring strategies: central thoracic region decisions and border/corner sensitive decisions, indicating possible shortcut learning that conventional metrics could not reveal. Masked image validation confirmed that model confidence and predicted class changed when central or peripheral regions were occluded. ReMoDEx thus provides a scalable relevance based decision assessment framework and an essential complement to accuracy based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出了ReMoDEx框架，用于对图像分类器的决策行为进行系统性、数据集规模的评估。该框架结合多种局部解释方法与全局模块，自动将大量相关性图聚类为少数决策策略，并应用于COVID-19肺部X光分类器，发现了模型依赖中央胸腔区域和边框/角落区域的捷径学习问题，而传统准确率指标无法揭示这些问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习图像分类器虽然性能强大，但决策过程不透明，可能依赖无关线索、捷径关联或伪影做出正确预测。在大规模数据集上，逐个样本检查热力图不可扩展，缺乏系统性、自动化的决策行为评估方法。
AI.method: ReMoDEx框架包含七步流水线：模型推理、目标类别选择、相关性图生成、热力图标准化、基于相似性的模式聚类、簇级解释、空间相关性评估。将GradCAM++、Integrated Gradients、Occlusion Sensitivity、Layerwise Relevance Propagation四种局部解释方法分别与一个全局模块结合，将整个相关性图集合自动摘要为少数决策策略簇。
AI.result: 应用于VGG16的COVID-19肺部X光分类器（测试准确率86.27%，AUC 0.9624），所有解释器一致发现两种策略：中央胸腔区域决策和边框/角落敏感决策，表明存在捷径学习。遮挡验证实验确认遮挡中央或外围区域会改变模型置信度和预测类别。
AI.conclusion: ReMoDEx提供了可扩展的基于相关性的决策评估框架，是传统基于准确率评估的重要补充，能够揭示模型依赖非任务相关区域的捷径学习问题。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。遥感图像分类同样面临模型依赖无关特征（如地理标记、传感器伪影、云层边缘等）的捷径学习问题。具体方案：(1) 将ReMoDEx应用于遥感场景分类器，系统检测模型是否依赖图像边界的地物拼接痕迹或水印；(2) 在遥感目标检测中扩展为ReMoDEx-Det，对检测框内外的相关性图进行聚类分析；(3) 结合多光谱/高光谱波段，评估模型是否真正利用目标光谱特征还是仅依赖空间纹理；(4) 利用簇级解释自动发现遥感数据中的未知混淆因素（如不同季节/光照下的伪相关性）。

title: InductWave: Inductive Multi-Hop Logical Query Answering on Knowledge Graphs
summary: Logical Multi-Hop Query Answering over Knowledge Graphs (KGs) can be formulated as querying, with an implicit completeness assumption. Current works mainly focus on Existential First Order Logic (EFO) queries. These EFO queries contain conjunction, disjunction, and negation operators. Most existing works employ transductive reasoning, meaning they are not capable of reasoning over entities unseen during training. In the real world, there is a resource scarcity, and we cannot train a model with all the nodes of a large KG. Hence, we propose InductWave, a wavelet-based inductive embedding method for logical query answering on large KGs. Here, the training graph consists of fewer nodes than the test graph. Our model performs on par with the baseline models while having half the number of message-passing layers. It outperforms all of them in most cases, with 75% of the layers. These fewer resource requirements enable us to evaluate InductWave on massive graphs, such as Wiki-KG. We test our model using extensive experiments across varying train-test graph proportions of the FB15k-(237) dataset, comparing it with the state-of-the-art models. The code and datasets for the model are available at https://github.com/kracr/inductwave/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InductWave，一种基于小波的归纳式嵌入方法，用于知识图谱上的逻辑多跳查询应答。该方法在训练图节点数少于测试图的情况下，能以更少的消息传递层（仅需基线的75%的层数）达到或超越现有方法的性能，并在大规模图（如Wiki-KG）上实现有效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱逻辑查询方法多为直推式推理，无法处理训练中未出现的实体；而现实世界中知识图谱规模庞大，难以对所有节点进行训练。因此需要一种归纳式、资源高效的查询推理方法。
AI.method: 采用基于小波变换的归纳式嵌入方法InductWave，通过小波基函数对图结构进行多尺度分解，实现对新实体的归纳式推理；训练图节点数少于测试图，仅使用基线模型一半的消息传递层数（75%的层数）完成推理。
AI.result: 在FB15k-(237)数据集上不同训练-测试图比例下进行广泛实验，InductWave在使用75%层数的情况下，在多数场景下超越所有基线模型，且能以更少资源在Wiki-KG等大规模图上进行评估。
AI.conclusion: InductWave证明了基于小波的归纳式方法在知识图谱逻辑查询中的有效性，能以更少的计算资源实现甚至超越现有方法的性能，特别适用于大规模知识图谱的归纳式推理场景。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感知识图谱（如遥感场景图、地理实体关系图）同样面临实体稀疏、训练不完整的问题。具体方案：(1) 将InductWave的小波归纳嵌入方法用于遥感场景中的逻辑查询，如“查询包含水体且邻近植被区域且非建筑区的遥感图像”等复合逻辑查询；(2) 利用小波多尺度特性处理遥感图像中不同空间分辨率的实体关系，实现跨尺度推理；(3) 可用于遥感知识图谱的增量式实体扩展，新采集的遥感实体无需重新训练即可参与查询推理。

title: Seeing What Matters: Lesion-Aware High-Resolution Patch Discovery and Fusion for Chest X-ray Report Generation
summary: Despite rapid advances in chest X-ray (CXR) foundation models, most radiology report generation (RRG) systems still rely on heavily downsampled inputs (e.g., 256x256) due to the fixed visual token budgets of pretrained vision encoders, suppressing subtle yet clinically important cues present in native-resolution images. However, enabling high-resolution (high-res) perception remains challenging: naive tiling causes prohibitive token inflation, while global compression suppresses subtle lesions and degrades diagnostic fidelity. Inspired by radiologists' workflow, localizing suspicious regions before detailed high-res assessment. We propose Lesion-Aware High-Resolution Patch Discovery and Fusion for Chest X-ray Reporting (LePaX), the first RRG framework that enables efficient high-res CXR perception (up to 1920x1920) without increasing the vision-token count. LePaX formulates high-res perception as a constrained spatial resolution allocation problem under a fixed token budget and introduces two key components: Learnable Spatial Resolution Allocation (LSRA), which learns a spatial utility map that adaptively allocates limited high-res capacity to diagnostically relevant regions, enabling targeted extraction of high-res patches from native CXRs; and Global-Regional Fusion (GRF), which performs token-preserving region-to-global refinement by projecting high-resolution regional evidence back onto the global feature grid through spatially aligned resolution write-back, avoiding token inflation. Experiments on multiple CXR benchmarks demonstrate that LePaX consistently improves both clinical and linguistic metrics while enabling native-resolution CXR perception with over 10x fewer visual tokens than naive high-res tiling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LePaX，一种针对胸部X光报告生成的框架，首次实现高效的原生高分辨率（最高1920x1920）CXR感知，在不增加视觉token数量的情况下，通过可学习的空间分辨率分配和全局-区域融合机制，提升诊断相关区域的细节捕捉能力，在多个基准上同时改善临床和语言指标。
AI.motivation: 现有胸部X光报告生成系统受限于预训练视觉编码器的固定视觉token预算，只能使用严重降采样的低分辨率输入（如256x256），导致微小的临床关键线索被抑制。而简单的平铺策略会导致token数量爆炸性增长，全局压缩又会掩盖细微病变。受放射科医生工作流程启发，需要一种能在固定token预算下高效感知高分辨率CXR的方法。
AI.method: LePaX包含两个核心组件：1) 可学习空间分辨率分配（LSRA），学习空间效用图，自适应地将有限的高分辨率容量分配给诊断相关区域，从原生CXR中提取高分辨率patch；2) 全局-区域融合（GRF），通过空间对齐的分辨率写回机制，将高分辨率区域证据投射回全局特征网格，实现保留token的区域到全局精炼，避免token膨胀。
AI.result: 在多个CXR基准上的实验表明，LePaX在临床指标和语言指标上均取得一致提升，同时实现原生分辨率CXR感知，其视觉token数量比朴素高分辨率平铺方法减少10倍以上。
AI.conclusion: LePaX是首个在固定token预算下实现高效高分辨率CXR感知的RRG框架，通过将高分辨率感知形式化为约束空间分辨率分配问题，有效解决了细微病变信息丢失与token膨胀之间的矛盾。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感影像同样面临"全局低分辨+局部高分辨"的矛盾：1) LSRA可直接迁移至遥感大场景中的小目标检测（如车辆、船只检测），自适应分配高分辨率patch到感兴趣区域；2) GRF的全局-区域融合机制可应用于遥感图像分割/变化检测，在保持全局上下文的同时注入高分辨局部细节；3) 遥感报告生成（如灾情描述）可直接套用LePaX框架，将"病灶"替换为"灾损区域"或"特定地物"进行高分辨率感知；4) 需注意遥感影像通道数更多（多光谱），需适配LSRA的效用图生成方式。

title: The Blind Curator: How a Biased Judge Silently Disables Skill Retirement in Self-Evolving Agents
summary: A self-evolving agent retires its bad skills by watching them fail, so what happens when the judge cannot see the failures? Skill retirement is the structural constraint that keeps a growing library from drifting below the no-skill baseline, but its guarantee assumes an unbiased reward, which is false for the LLM judges that reference-free tasks force upon us. We show that a biased judge does not merely add noise; it \emph{silently switches off the curator}. We make this precise with a corrupted-reward analysis and, isolating the causal channel by injecting corruption on top of a deterministic reward, a behavioral study on a reference-free report-writing testbed with a code-generation cross-check. Symmetric noise leaves retirement intact, but \emph{false-pass} bias (failures slipping through as passes) disables contribution-based retirement past a sharp threshold that no amount of data can cross. Separating genuine retirement from cap-eviction churn shows this \emph{mechanism} failure is universal, holding across domains and failure rates and sparing only near-zero-false-pass, verifier-like graders. The downstream \emph{outcome}, though, is regime-dependent: eval quality degrades only where the same corruption also starves skill synthesis, and otherwise holds steady, so the disabled curator is \emph{silent}, surfacing in no aggregate metric. The contribution is a behavioral safety result, not a performance one. A cheap defect-injection audit then tells an operator, before deployment, which side of the threshold their judge occupies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自进化智能体在依赖有偏LLM裁判（无参考任务中不可避免）时的技能淘汰机制失效问题。理论分析表明，假阳性偏差（失败被误判为成功）会超过不可逾越的阈值，彻底关闭基于贡献的技能淘汰机制，且这种失效是"无声的"——不会在聚合指标中显现。作者提出了一种廉价的缺陷注入审计方法，可在部署前判断裁判是否位于危险阈值一侧。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化智能体假设奖励无偏，但LLM裁判在无参考任务中必然存在偏差。作者要揭示有偏裁判不是单纯添加噪声，而是会静默关闭技能淘汰的策展机制，并找出这种机制失效的条件和后果。
AI.method: 采用腐败奖励的数学分析，并结合行为研究——在确定性奖励之上注入腐败以隔离因果通道，使用无参考报告生成测试平台和代码生成交叉验证。通过区分真正的技能淘汰与上限驱逐扰动来验证机制失效的普遍性。
AI.result: 对称噪声不影响淘汰机制，但假阳性偏差在超过某个阈值后会使基于贡献的淘汰完全失效，且该阈值无法通过增加数据量跨越。这种机制失效在多个领域和失败率下普遍存在，仅接近零假阳性的验证器类裁判可以幸免。但下游性能退化仅在相同腐败同时饿死技能合成时发生，否则聚合指标保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 有偏裁判会静默关闭自进化智能体的技能淘汰机制，这是一种行为安全结果而非性能问题。需要部署前的缺陷注入审计来判断裁判是否处于安全阈值内。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感领域同样存在大量无参考评估任务（如云检测、地物分类的自动质量评估），若采用LLM裁判进行自进化智能体训练，同样可能面临假阳性偏差导致技能库退化问题。具体方案：1）在遥感智能体系统中引入本文的缺陷注入审计方法，对裁判进行预部署检测；2）利用遥感中可获取的真实参考数据（如人工标注的地物分类图）作为验证基准，校准LLM裁判的偏差；3）在遥感自动化解译流水线中，对技能淘汰环节设置双裁判（LLM+传统指标）交叉验证机制。

title: Smart Scissor: Coupling Spatial Redundancy Reduction and CNN Compression for Embedded Hardware
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures. Author's version, accepted by and published in ICCAD 2022. Copyright 2022 ACM
summary: Scaling down the resolution of input images can greatly reduce the computational overhead of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which is promising for edge AI. However, as an image usually contains much spatial redundancy, e.g., background pixels, directly shrinking the whole image will lose important features of the foreground object and lead to severe accuracy degradation. In this paper, we propose a dynamic image cropping framework to reduce the spatial redundancy by accurately cropping the foreground object from images. To achieve the instance-aware fine cropping, we introduce a lightweight foreground predictor to efficiently localize and crop the foreground of an image. The finely cropped images can be correctly recognized even at a small resolution. Meanwhile, computational redundancy also exists in CNN architectures. To pursue higher execution efficiency on resource-constrained embedded devices, we also propose a compound shrinking strategy to coordinately compress the three dimensions (depth, width, resolution) of CNNs. Eventually, we seamlessly combine the proposed dynamic image cropping and compound shrinking into a unified compression framework, Smart Scissor, which is expected to significantly reduce the computational overhead of CNNs while still maintaining high accuracy. Experiments on ImageNet-1K demonstrate that our method reduces the computational cost of ResNet50 by 41.5% while improving the top-1 accuracy by 0.3%. Moreover, compared to HRank, the state-of-the-art CNN compression framework, our method achieves 4.1% higher top-1 accuracy at the same computational cost. The codes and data are available at https://github.com/ntuliuteam/smart-scissor

AI.tldr: 本文提出Smart Scissor统一压缩框架，通过动态图像裁剪（裁剪前景目标）和复合收缩（协同压缩深度、宽度、分辨率三个维度）相结合，在降低CNN计算开销的同时保持高精度。在ImageNet-1K上，ResNet50计算成本降低41.5%，top-1准确率提升0.3%；相比SOTA方法HRank，相同计算成本下top-1准确率提升4.1%。
AI.motivation: 降低输入图像分辨率可减少CNN计算开销，但直接缩小整张图像会丢失前景物体的重要特征导致精度严重下降。同时CNN架构中也存在计算冗余，需要更高效的压缩策略以适配资源受限的边缘设备。
AI.method: （1）动态图像裁剪：引入轻量级前景预测器，实例感知地定位并裁剪图像中的前景目标，使小分辨率下仍能正确识别；（2）复合收缩策略：协同压缩CNN的深度、宽度、分辨率三个维度；（3）将两者统一为Smart Scissor框架。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，ResNet50计算成本降低41.5%，top-1准确率提升0.3%；相比HRank，相同计算成本下top-1准确率提升4.1%。
AI.conclusion: 动态前景裁剪与复合维度收缩相结合可有效减少空间冗余和架构冗余，在显著降低计算开销的同时维持甚至提升模型精度，适用于边缘AI场景。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感图像通常包含大面积背景（如海洋、农田、沙漠），前景目标（如舰船、飞机、车辆）占比很小，直接缩放会丢失关键目标特征。具体方案：（1）将动态前景预测器适配遥感目标检测场景，针对遥感图像中大尺度变化、旋转多变的特点，在前景预测器中加入旋转不变性设计；（2）复合收缩策略可直接应用于遥感CNN模型（如遥感目标检测网络YOLO系列、语义分割网络DeepLab系列），按深度-宽度-分辨率协同压缩以减少边缘设备部署（如星载、无人机载）的计算和存储开销；（3）可进一步结合遥感多尺度特性，在前景裁剪后引入超分辨率重建模块以补偿小目标信息损失。

title: SpaCellAgent: A Self-Evolving LLM-Based Multi-Agent Framework for Trajectory Analysis
summary: Spatial and Single-cell transcriptomics are transformative in deciphering cellular dynamics. As the fundamental paradigm for reconstructing cell developmental paths, trajectory inference (TI) is critical. However, existing methods require extensive manual intervention and proficiency in heterogeneous tools, posing a significant barrier to efficient TI analysis. To bridge this gap, we propose SpaCellAgent, an autonomous large language model (LLM) multi-agent framework that automates end-to-end spatiotemporal analysis and narrative generation. SpaCellAgent utilizes a multi-agent architecture for strategic workflow planning, a dynamic tool-orchestration engine for adaptive algorithm selection, and a self-evolution module that iteratively refines performance through feedback. We evaluate SpaCellAgent on six heterogeneous datasets encompassing complex temporal developmental trajectories, diverse sequencing platforms, and spatially-resolved tissue architectures. SpaCellAgent consistently demonstrates over 40\% improvement in analytical efficiency while maintaining expert-aligned performance. By converting natural language specifications into optimized analytical workflows and fully automating the pipeline, SpaCellAgent democratizes advanced spatiotemporal modeling and establishes a scalable, agent-driven paradigm for computational biology. The code and materials are available at https://github.com/LittleXH-shw/SpaCellAgent.

AI.tldr: SpaCellAgent 是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，能够自动化端到端的空间转录组学轨迹推断分析，无需人工干预，在六个异构数据集上相比现有方法效率提升40%以上，性能与专家相当。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹推断方法需要大量人工干预和对多种工具的熟练使用，阻碍了高效的细胞发育轨迹分析。为此提出 SpaCellAgent 以桥接这一差距。
AI.method: 采用多智能体架构进行策略性工作流规划；动态工具编排引擎实现自适应算法选择；自进化模块通过反馈迭代优化性能；将自然语言指令转换为优化后的分析工作流并全自动执行。
AI.result: 在六个异构数据集上（涵盖复杂时间发育轨迹、多种测序平台和空间分辨组织架构），SpaCellAgent 始终实现超过40%的分析效率提升，同时保持与专家水平对齐的性能。
AI.conclusion: SpaCellAgent 使高级空间转录组学建模民主化，建立了一种可扩展的、由智能体驱动的计算生物学新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1) SpaCellAgent的多智能体架构可直接迁移至遥感影像分析，用于自动化处理从数据预处理到特征提取的完整流程；2) 动态工具编排引擎可适配遥感领域多种算法库（如GDAL、Orfeo ToolBox、PyTorch Segmentation Models），实现自适应算法选择；3) 自进化模块可用于遥感模型的持续优化；4) 空间转录组学中的空间解析组织架构分析方法对高分辨率遥感影像的语义分割和地物识别具有直接借鉴意义。

title: LoCA: Spatially-Aware Low-Rank Convolutional Adaptation of Vision Foundation Models
summary: Pre-trained Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) provide strong visual representations for diverse downstream tasks. The key challenge of VFM adaptation stems from the prohibitive costs of full fine-tuning and catastrophic forgetting. To address this, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as the prevailing paradigm for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT). However, LoRA is typically designed for transformer self-attention layers parameterized by 2D matrices. Since convolutional kernels inherently couple spatial and channel information within a 4D tensor, forcing them into a monolithic 2D matrix disrupts the inherent spatial topology. In this paper, we propose Low-Rank Convolutional Adaptation (LoCA), a convolution-aware PEFT framework that addresses spatial-channel entanglement by decoupling channel and spatial adaptation. LoCA introduces a low-rank channel adaptation for dense cross-channel mixing and refines spatial bases extracted from pre-trained kernels via Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). Experimental results show that LoCA preserves pre-trained spatial priors and achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across fine-grained classification, domain-generalized semantic segmentation, and generative benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoCA（低秩卷积适应）框架，通过解耦通道和空间适应来解决卷积核在参数高效微调中因4D张量被迫展平为2D矩阵而破坏空间拓扑的问题，在细粒度分类、域泛化语义分割和生成基准上取得竞争性或最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA方法专为Transformer自注意力层的2D矩阵设计，但卷积核是4D张量，简单展平会破坏空间-通道的耦合关系和固有的空间拓扑结构，导致预训练的空间先验丢失。
AI.method: LoCA通过解耦通道适应和空间适应：引入低秩通道适应模块进行密集的跨通道混合，同时利用预训练卷积核的奇异值分解（SVD）提取空间基并对其进行微调，从而在保留预训练空间先验的同时实现高效的参数微调。
AI.result: 在细粒度分类、域泛化语义分割和生成基准任务上，LoCA达到了竞争性或最先进的性能，验证了其有效保留预训练空间先验的能力。
AI.conclusion: LoCA作为卷积感知的PEFT框架，通过解耦通道与空间适应有效解决了卷积核在参数高效微调中的结构不匹配问题，为卷积网络的微调提供了新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感领域大量使用卷积网络（如ResNet、EfficientNet）进行遥感图像分类、分割和目标检测，LoCA可直接应用于这些模型的微调。具体改进方案：（1）遥感域适应中，LoCA可保留预训练的空间先验（如地物纹理、边缘信息），提升跨场景/跨传感器的域泛化语义分割性能；（2）遥感细粒度分类（如树种、建筑物类型识别）中，LoCA的低秩通道适应能更高效地提取区分性特征，缓解标注数据稀缺问题；（3）遥感生成任务（如云去除、超分辨率）中，LoCA可作为生成器骨干的微调策略，在保留预训练图像先验的同时进行任务适配。

title: Search, Fail, Recover: A Training Framework for Correction-Aware Reasoning
summary: Many reasoning tasks are not well described by a single left-to-right chain: a solver may need to pursue a plausible branch, observe delayed failure, and return to the latest prefix that can still be completed. We introduce Pyligent, a training and inference framework inspired by the Diligent Learner formulation that represents reasoning as validated search over partial solution chains. A task validator labels generated continuations and failures, and the resulting search trees are converted into supervised targets for three actions: continue, finish, and backtrack, with optional traces that summarize abandoned branches. We evaluate Pyligent on a hidden directed graph task designed to isolate delayed-failure recovery, and on structured reasoning domains with exact validators, including $4{\times}4$ Sudoku, Sudoku with reasoning traces, and Blocksworld. Compared with gold-only supervised fine-tuning, Pyligent improves solve rate by $72.7$ percentage points on hidden graphs, by $17$ and $18$ points on mixed and expert Sudoku, by $27$ and $14$ points on mixed and expert Sudoku with reasoning traces, and by $13$ points on Blocksworld. These results suggest that explicit failed-branch supervision can teach useful recovery behavior beyond imitation of polished solution chains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pyligent框架，将推理建模为带验证的搜索过程，通过监督三个动作（继续、完成、回溯）和失败分支摘要，在隐藏图、数独和积木世界等任务上显著提升了求解率。
AI.motivation: 许多推理任务不适合从左到右的单链建模，求解器需要尝试可行分支、观察延迟失败并回溯到可完成的前缀。现有方法缺乏对失败分支的显式监督。
AI.method: 受Diligent Learner启发，Pyligent使用任务验证器标记生成结果和失败，将搜索树转换为三个动作（继续、完成、回溯）的监督目标，并生成可选的分支摘要轨迹。
AI.result: 在隐藏图任务上求解率提升72.7个百分点；在混合/专家数独上提升17/18个百分点；带推理轨迹的混合/专家数独提升27/14个百分点；积木世界提升13个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 显式的失败分支监督可以教会模型超越单纯模仿完美解链的恢复行为，显著提升推理能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感解译（如变化检测、语义分割）常需多步推理验证，可引入Pyligent框架：1) 将不同解释路径建模为搜索树，用地面真值作为验证器；2) 在错误解释路径上显式监督回溯行为，避免级联误差；3) 利用分支摘要轨迹辅助模型理解为何某条解释路径不可行，提升遥感AI的推理鲁棒性。

title: Compass: Prostate Cancer Detection Needs Multi-View Context
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) analysis of micro-ultrasound ($μ$US) has shown promise for prostate cancer (PCa) detection. However, most existing AI methods focus on the analysis of single $μ$US images in isolation. By contrast, expert $μ$US readers typically assess a full recorded video study, which provides three-dimensional context, to improve PCa detection compared to single-frame analysis. Inspired by this clinical workflow, we propose Compass, a novel AI methodology which models a $μ$US study as a stream of 2D images. Compass jointly integrates rotational sweep videos of the prostate with $μ$US frames acquired at the moment of biopsy, and performs evidence aggregation across the study using a transformer conditioned on the probe's rotational angle. Finally, a decoder head predicts frame-level and study-level risk scores for the patient. The model is trained and evaluated using a multi-center clinical trial dataset of $μ$US studies, including continuous rotational scans of the prostate and videos captured during biopsy acquisition. We compare the proposed method to baseline AI methods from the literature and to risk scores provided by clinical experts. Our framework shows strong performance, highlighting the value of multi-view context for $μ$US PCa detection, and providing a potentially powerful tool to complement human expertise in $μ$US-based PCa diagnosis. Our code is available at: https://github.com/mharmanani/Compass.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Compass，一种利用Transformer对前列腺微超声（μUS）视频流进行多视图上下文聚合的AI方法，用于提高前列腺癌检测性能。该方法将μUS检查视为2D图像流，联合整合旋转扫查视频和活检时刻帧，通过基于探头旋转角度的条件Transformer进行证据聚合，最终输出帧级和检查级风险评分。在多中心临床试验数据集上，该方法优于现有AI基线和临床专家评分。
AI.motivation: 现有AI方法大多仅分析单张μUS图像，忽略了超声检查中三维上下文信息；而临床专家通常利用完整视频检查来提升检测准确性。作者受此启发，旨在设计一种能够利用多视图视频流上下文进行前列腺癌检测的AI方法。
AI.method: Compass将μUS检查建模为2D图像流，采用Transformer架构，以探头旋转角度为条件进行帧间证据聚合，联合处理前列腺旋转扫查视频和活检时刻采集的μUS帧，最终通过解码头同时预测帧级和检查级风险评分。
AI.result: 在多中心临床试验数据集上，Compass在PCa检测性能上优于已有AI基线方法以及临床专家的风险评分，展现了多视图上下文对μUS前列腺癌检测的重要价值。
AI.conclusion: Compass通过建模完整μUS视频流并利用旋转角度条件化的Transformer进行多视图证据聚合，显著提升了前列腺癌检测性能，有望成为辅助临床专家进行μUS诊断的有力工具。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样存在大量视频/时序影像数据（如卫星视频、无人机巡检视频），现有方法也多聚焦于单帧分析。可借鉴Compass的旋转角度条件化Transformer思路：1）对于多角度遥感影像（如SAR多方位观测、多视角无人机影像），利用传感器姿态角作为条件进行跨视角特征聚合；2）将遥感视频流（如卫星视频目标跟踪）中的时空上下文建模为帧流，通过角度/位置编码的Transformer进行长时序证据融合；3）结合关键帧（类似活检时刻帧）策略，在遥感变化检测或目标识别中引入关键时刻的聚焦机制。

title: Do LLM-Generated Skills Make Better AI Data Scientists? A Component Ablation Across Data-Science Workflows
comment: KDD 2026 Workshop on AI Data Scientist
summary: Product data scientists often ask LLM-based agents to help with recurring execution tasks such as cleaning data, writing SQL, choosing statistical tests, and formatting results. Reusable skill files are meant to avoid prompting from scratch by packaging guidance for a task family. Expert-written skills can encode high-quality guidance, but writing and maintaining them across many data-science task families creates a manual bottleneck. We ask whether LLM-generated skills offer a useful low-curation alternative: do they improve performance over the task prompt alone? We test this question across four lifecycle stages: data preparation, data extraction, statistical analysis, and reporting, using one generated skill per stage. We find no reliable improvement from full generated skills over No-Skill prompting. We then ask whether any part of the skill is useful by ablating different skill components. The main ablation covers 56 tasks, nine model configurations, and three providers, yielding 7,560 runs. Compared with prompting using the task alone, neither the full generated skill nor any ablated skill variant significantly improves performance; all p-values are at least 0.396, and the total spread across variants is only 1.2 pp. A supplemental token-matched control adds 1,512 runs and finds that Full skills perform similarly to task-irrelevant skill-formatted content. The results caution against using one LLM-generated skill per data-science workflow as a default single-shot prompting strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了LLM生成的一次性技能文件（skill files）在数据科学工作流（数据准备、提取、统计分析、报告）中的有效性。通过7,560次主实验和1,512次对照实验发现，完整生成的技能文件、其任何消融变体均未显著优于无技能基线（p≥0.396，性能差异仅1.2个百分点），且完整技能与任务无关的格式填充文本效果相当。结论警示：不应将每阶段一个LLM生成技能作为默认的单次提示策略。
AI.motivation: 产品数据科学家反复向LLM代理询问数据清洗、SQL编写、统计检验选择等重复性执行任务。专家编写的技能文件虽然质量高但维护成本大，因此作者探究LLM自动生成的技能文件能否作为一种低人工维护的有效替代方案。
AI.method: 跨四个数据科学生命周期阶段（数据准备、数据提取、统计分析、报告），每个阶段使用一个LLM生成的技能文件进行测试。主实验覆盖56个任务、9种模型配置、3个提供商，共7,560次运行。通过消融实验分析技能各组成部分的贡献，并设置token匹配的对照实验（1,512次运行）排除token数量干扰。
AI.result: 完整生成的技能文件未可靠优于无技能提示；所有消融变体也未能显著提升性能（所有p值≥0.396，性能总跨度为1.2个百分点）。token匹配对照显示完整技能与任务无关的格式填充文本表现相似。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成的每阶段一个技能文件作为默认单次提示策略效果不佳，不建议作为通用实践。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。在遥感领域，数据科学家同样面临重复性任务（如影像预处理、波段运算、植被指数计算、变化检测统计）。可借鉴本文实验框架，系统评估LLM生成的遥感专属技能文件（如"Sentinel-2预处理技能""植被指数计算技能"）是否优于直接任务提示。但需注意遥感任务专业性强、领域知识密度高，单技能文件可能难以覆盖多样化的传感器和场景，建议结合多技能组合或检索增强生成策略。

title: Bi-PT: Bidirectional Cross-Attention Point Transformers for Four-Chamber Heart Reconstruction from Sparse Cardiac MRI Data
summary: We propose Bi-PT, a pipeline for reconstructing 3D four-chamber human heart meshes from clinical sparsely sampled cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) data. This work addresses the error-prone generation of 3D cardiac shape from a sparse point cloud (SPC) extracted from 2D long-axis and short-axis views used in routine clinical CMR protocols. Bi-PT enables accurate inference of the four-chamber heart mesh from the SPC by learning robust point features via bidirectional point cross-attention between an atlas and the SPC, together with per-point semantic labels that improve correspondence estimation. We formulate the deformation field as a Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) parameterized by a per-point affine transformation and translation to deform the atlas toward the target heart shape. By learning such a NODE, we can guarantee the deformation field to be a locally affine diffeomorphic deformation. We also integrate a semantic label loss into the Chamfer distance to encourage label-consistent correspondences and add a smoothness regularization to stabilize and improve the learning of the deformation field. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Bi-PT achieves accurate and robust performance compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: Bi-PT是一种从临床稀疏采样CMR数据中重建三维四腔心脏网格的流程，通过双向点交叉注意力从稀疏点云推断心脏网格，并利用神经ODE保证变形场的局部仿射微分同胚性。
AI.motivation: 临床常规CMR协议仅获取2D长轴和短轴视图，从中提取的稀疏点云难以准确生成3D心脏形状，现有方法存在误差大、对应关系不准确的问题。
AI.method: 1) 从2D长轴和短轴视图提取稀疏点云(SPC)；2) 通过双向点交叉注意力学习atlas与SPC之间的鲁棒点特征及逐点语义标签；3) 将变形场建模为神经ODE，由逐点仿射变换和平移参数化，保证局部仿射微分同胚变形；4) 结合语义标签损失的Chamfer距离和光滑正则化项优化变形场学习。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Bi-PT相比基线方法实现了更准确且鲁棒的三维心脏网格重建性能。
AI.conclusion: Bi-PT有效解决了从临床稀疏采样的CMR数据中重建三维四腔心脏网格的难题，通过双向注意力机制和神经ODE变形场实现了高精度重建。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。该方法的双向点云跨注意力机制和神经ODE变形场可迁移至遥感三维重建任务：(1) 从多视角遥感影像提取稀疏点云后，利用双向注意力机制融合LiDAR点云与先验模型实现建筑物精细重建；(2) 神经ODE保证变形场的拓扑保持特性可用于地形变化监测中地表模型的微分同胚变形；(3) 语义标签损失可扩展至地物分类引导的三维重建，如建筑物/植被/道路的标签一致性对应。

title: RL Post-Training Builds Compositional Reasoning Strategies
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Compositional Learning at ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea
summary: Does RL post-training merely amplify primitive skills already latent in a base model, or can it compose primitive skills into new higher-level strategies? We study this question in a fully observable rewrite-grammar environment where the pretraining distribution is known and every generated rewrite can be audited. A Transformer is pretrained on primitive symbol-rewrite chains and post-trained on a Trace-based reasoning task with only a binary final-answer reward. RL solves held-out problems that remain rarely solved by the pretrained model even under much larger sampling budgets, while rejection fine-tuning improves early but plateaus. Trace analysis shows that RL reorganizes primitive competence through a phased compositional mechanism: it first strengthens primitive reductions, then discovers valid composed procedures. These include sequential compositions, which collapse ordered chains of primitive contractions, and parallel compositions, which combine independent primitive contractions in a single step. The composed procedures are not isolated samples; they are reused and consolidated into a stable repertoire. Comparing RL with rejection fine-tuning shows that the key difference is not exploration volume but selectivity: RFT produces many shortcut-like rewrites, much of them invalid, whereas RL concentrates exploration into valid reusable structure. Pretraining ablations show that the emergence of compositional strategies is gated not by primitive exposure alone, but by whether pretraining organizes primitive competence into reduction procedures that RL can later compress. The base model provides weak procedural ingredients; RL builds them into reliable higher-level strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究RL后训练是否仅放大基座模型中已有的原始技能，还是能将这些技能组合成新的高级策略。通过在可完全观测的重写语法环境中进行实验，发现RL确实能够将原始符号重写能力组合为顺序和并行复合策略，且这些策略会被稳定复用。与拒绝微调（RFT）相比，RL的关键优势并非探索量，而是选择性——RL更集中于有效的可重用结构。预训练消融实验表明，复合策略的出现不仅取决于原始技能暴露，还取决于预训练是否将这些技能组织成可被RL压缩的归约程序。
AI.motivation: 探究RL后训练是否仅仅放大基座模型中已存在的原始技能，还是能够将这些原始技能组合成新的、更高层次的策略，从而理解RL在推理能力涌现中的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 在可完全观测的重写语法环境中，Transformer先在原始符号重写链上进行预训练，再通过仅有二元最终答案奖励的Trace推理任务进行RL后训练。通过对比RL与拒绝微调（RFT），并进行轨迹分析、预训练消融等实验来揭示RL的组成机制。
AI.result: RL能解决基座模型即使在更大采样预算下也极少解决的难题；RFT初期提升但很快停滞。轨迹分析发现RL通过先强化原始归约、再发现有效复合程序的过程工作，包括顺序复合和并行复合。RL与RFT的关键差异不是探索量而是选择性：RFT产生大量短路式重写（多数无效），RL则将探索集中在有效的可重用结构上。预训练消融表明复合策略的出现需要预训练将原始技能组织成可压缩的归约程序。
AI.conclusion: 基座模型提供了弱的程序性成分，RL后训练将这些成分构建成可靠的高级策略。RL的核心能力在于选择性探索和结构化重组，而非单纯放大已有能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文揭示了RL如何将原始技能组合为高级策略的机制，对遥感领域有重要启示：（1）在遥感图像解译中，可借鉴其顺序复合策略，将边缘检测、纹理分析等基础操作组合为更高级的地物识别流程；（2）并行复合策略可用于多模态遥感数据（如光学+SAR+高光谱）的联合特征提取，将各模态的独立处理步骤压缩为一步；（3）选择性探索机制可用于遥感大模型的RL微调，避免无效的推理路径，提高模型在复杂场景（如变化检测、目标识别）中的泛化能力；（4）预训练阶段应注重基础遥感处理程序的结构化组织（如分割→分类→后处理的流水线），以为后续RL压缩提供良好基础。

title: General Incomplete Multimodal Learning via Dynamic Quality Perception
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Corresponding author: Shicai Wei
summary: Multimodal learning robust to missing modalities is essential for real-world applications. Existing methods mainly focus on inter-modality missing, where entire modalities are absent, while overlooking intra-modality degradation, where modalities are present but severely corrupted. In practice, these two types of missing often coexist, making existing approaches ineffective. To address this limitation, we propose General Incomplete Multimodal Learning (GIML), a unified framework that simultaneously handles both inter-modality missing and intra-modality degradation through dynamic quality perception. Specifically, GIML models heterogeneous missing patterns as continuous modality information degradation, enabling degradation-aware adaptive fusion. To achieve reliable quality perception, we introduce a Noise-aware Quality Estimator that learns the mapping from corrupted features to noise intensity through controlled noise injection. Furthermore, we propose a Noise-Semantic Decoupled module that separates semantic information from noise interference. This improves robustness and generalization to unseen corruption patterns. Extensive experiments across datasets with diverse modality types demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of GIML. Code is available at: https://github.com/Yu-Five/GIML.

AI.tldr: 提出GIML统一框架，同时处理模态间缺失（整个模态缺失）和模态内退化（模态存在但严重损坏）两种不完整多模态学习问题，通过动态质量感知实现退化感知的自适应融合。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态学习方法主要关注模态间缺失，忽略了模态内退化问题，且实际场景中两者常共存，现有方法效果不佳。
AI.method: 1) 将异构缺失模式建模为连续模态信息退化，实现退化感知自适应融合；2) 提出噪声感知质量估计器，通过受控噪声注入学习从退化特征到噪声强度的映射；3) 提出噪声-语义解耦模块，将语义信息与噪声干扰分离。
AI.result: 在多种模态类型的数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了GIML的有效性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: GIML统一框架能够同时应对模态间缺失和模态内退化，提升模型对未见过的损坏模式的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感多模态数据（如SAR-光学、多光谱-高光谱）常受云遮挡（模态内退化）和传感器故障（模态间缺失）同时影响。可将GIML的噪声感知质量估计器应用于遥感图像去云/去噪任务，通过噪声-语义解耦模块分离地物语义与噪声，提升复杂环境下的多模态遥感融合性能。

title: Recursive Self-Improvement in AI: From Bounded Self-Refinement to Autonomous Research Loops
summary: AI systems increasingly participate in their own improvement: revising their outputs, adapting their own harnesses during deployment, training on data they generate, and, increasingly, conducting AI research itself. This literature is described under a vocabulary ("self-refine," "self-reward," "self-play," "self-evolve") that conflates fundamentally different ambitions. We survey 1,250 arXiv papers (2024-2026) along two axes: what the system improves -- its behavior in deployment, its policy through training, its evaluator, or the research process itself -- and the degree of loop closure (human-in-the-loop to fully closed). The taxonomy separates bounded self-refinement -- convergent, evaluable, and already industrial practice -- from open-ended recursive self-improvement (RSI), which remains bounded by grounding requirements, collapse dynamics, and compute constraints on every measured axis. Its distinctive feature is a dedicated category for self-evaluation: every improvement loop is a claim that some signal can substitute for human judgment. We survey the evaluator design space -- judges, process reward models, verifiers, rubrics, meta-evaluation -- order the signals into a verification hierarchy from formal verifiers (strongest) to intrinsic self-assessment (weakest), and observe that demonstrated self-improvement strength tracks this hierarchy, that its failure modes (self-confirming loops, model collapse, diversity collapse) follow from its violations, and that the "research direction-setting" bottleneck keeping humans in the loop sits at the top of that hierarchy. We connect the technical literature to the theory of RSI limits and to the safety and governance questions raised by frontier-lab accounts of closing the loop, and identify governance-grade measurement of self-improvement as the field's most underpopulated niche.

AI.tldr: 本文系统调查了AI自我改进文献（2024-2026年1250篇arXiv论文），沿两条轴——改进对象（行为/策略/评估器/研究过程）与闭环程度（人在环内到完全闭环）——进行归类，提出基于验证层次的自评估信号分类体系，并论证自我改进强度与验证层次正相关，最终识别出自我改进的可治理度量是该领域最被忽视的方向。
AI.motivation: 现有文献使用"self-refine""self-reward""self-play""self-evolve"等词汇混为一谈，混淆了根本不同的技术野心。亟需一个统一的分析框架来厘清不同自我改进方法的本质差异、能力边界和失败模式。
AI.method: 对2024-2026年1250篇arXiv论文进行系统性综述，构建双轴分类法：（1）改进对象维度：部署行为、训练策略、评估器、研究过程；（2）闭环程度维度：人在环内到完全闭环。提出验证层次（Verification Hierarchy），从形式验证器（最强）到内在自我评估（最弱）排序自评估信号。
AI.result: 发现自我改进的实证强度严格遵循验证层次排序；其失败模式（自我确认循环、模型崩溃、多样性崩溃）源于对该层次的违反；研究方向设定瓶颈位于层次顶端，是人保持参与的关键环节；自我改进的可治理度量是当前最被忽视的研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 封闭式自我改进（bounded self-refinement）已收敛、可评估且是工业实践，而开放端递归自我改进（RSI）仍受制于基础约束、崩溃动力学和计算限制。论文连接了RSI极限理论、安全治理问题，并呼吁加强自我改进的标准化度量研究。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域可借鉴该验证层次框架：（1）将遥感产品（地表分类、变化检测、参数反演）的自验证按验证信号强度排序：地面实测数据（最强）→交叉验证→ 一致性检验→自一致性（最弱）；（2）遥感模型自我改进闭环中，需警惕"自确认循环"（如合成数据训练导致地表覆盖分类漂移），应将地面真值作为最高等级验证锚点；（3）借鉴论文提出的"人在环顶端"思想，在遥感大模型的自训练中保留专家对训练方向（如同化哪些遥感产品作为基准）的把控。

title: Self-Supervised Pretraining Improves Cross-Site and Cross-Scale Robustness of Point Cloud Leaf-Wood Segmentation
summary: The accuracy of existing leaf-wood segmentation methods for tree point clouds varies across forest types and sites. Self-supervised learning (SSL) on point clouds has improved the generalization of deep learning models for forestry point cloud tasks, including biomass regression and individual tree segmentation, but its applicability to leaf-wood segmentation remains untested. In this study, we pretrained Point-M2AE, a widely used SSL architecture for point clouds, on ShapeNet-55 augmented with 2,400 individual tree point clouds. For fine-tuning and inference, we used recursive voxel subdivision to handle the wide variation in point density across inputs, allowing the same model to operate at both individual-tree and plot scales without architecture change. Compared to the model without pretraining, the pretrained model improved wood IoU from 60.5% to 70.0% for needleleaf and from 69.7% to 76.3% for broadleaf trees. On a benchmark spanning four countries across three climatic zones, the pretrained model achieved the smallest cross-site variation and highest overall performance among compared methods (LeWos, CWLS, and PointTransformer). Plot-level segmentation maintained accuracy comparable to individual-tree performance, with mIoU of 84.7% for broadleaf and 77.7% for needleleaf plots, showing that the model generalizes across scales without additional finetuning. As a downstream test in tropical forests, where dense canopies make segmentation challenging, we applied our model and a quantitative structure model to estimate wood volume for 28 trees from Guyana, Indonesia, and Peru to assess whether the segmentation improvements from SSL pretraining translate into improved downstream performance. The resulting volume estimates achieved the lowest error among all methods tested (MAE = 2.40 m$^3$), less than half that of algorithmic baselines (LeWos: 5.94 m$^3$; CWLS: 5.27 m$^3$).

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于自监督学习（SSL）的Point-M2AE架构，结合递归体素细分方法，实现对树木点云中叶片与木材的高精度分割。在多个气候带、跨国家和尺度（单木到样地）的基准测试中，预训练模型在分割精度和跨站点泛化能力上均显著优于现有方法，并在热带森林木材体积估算下游任务中取得最低误差（MAE=2.40 m³）。
AI.motivation: 现有叶-木分割方法在不同森林类型和站点间的精度差异大，而自监督学习在林业点云任务（如生物量回归、单木分割）中已提升模型泛化能力，但其在叶-木分割中的应用尚未被验证。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索SSL预训练对叶-木分割泛化性能的提升效果。
AI.method: 1）采用Point-M2AE作为SSL架构，在ShapeNet-55和2400棵单木点云上预训练；2）提出递归体素细分策略，处理点密度差异，使模型无需改变架构即可同时适用于单木和样地尺度；3）在四个国家三个气候带的基准数据集上微调并评估；4）以热带森林木材体积估算作为下游任务验证分割改进的实际效益。
AI.result: 预训练模型使针叶树木材IoU从60.5%提升至70.0%，阔叶树从69.7%提升至76.3%；跨站点变异性最小，整体性能优于LeWos、CWLS和PointTransformer；样地级mIoU达84.7%（阔叶）和77.7%（针叶）；热带森林木材体积估算MAE=2.40 m³，低于LeWos（5.94 m³）和CWLS（5.27 m³）。
AI.conclusion: SSL预训练能显著提升叶-木分割的精度和跨站点、跨尺度的泛化能力，并且分割改进可有效转化为下游任务（如木材体积估算）的性能提升，验证了SSL在林业点云分析中的实用价值。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该研究的SSL预训练+递归体素细分框架可直接迁移至遥感森林点云（如LiDAR、UAV点云）的叶-木分割任务。具体方案：1）将ShapeNet-55预训练替换为大规模遥感点云数据集（如OpenTopography、GEDI）进行SSL预训练；2）递归体素细分策略适用于机载LiDAR点云密度不均匀的场景，可直接用于区域尺度森林点云分割；3）下游木材体积估算可扩展至森林碳储量、生物量遥感估算；4）该方法还可推广到其他遥感点云语义分割任务，如建筑-植被分离、地形-地物分类等。

title: SkillCenter: A Large-Scale Source-Grounded Skill Library for Autonomous AI Agents
summary: Autonomous AI agents can execute complex tasks with limited human review, yet they often lack the grounded operational knowledge to make their outputs not just executable but correct, secure, and maintainable. We introduce SkillCenter, to our knowledge the largest open skill library for agents by total count: 216,938 structured skills across 24 domain bundles. A SkillGate-filtered pipeline contributes 114,565 source-grounded skills from peer-reviewed journals, ArXiv, and over 24,000 technical sources, integrated with 102,373 community skills from GitHub and the ClawHub marketplace. We present the end-to-end framework that builds the pipeline subset: multi-source acquisition, an LLM-based quality gate (SkillGate), template-driven generation, iterative source-grounding, and quality-controlled publishing. Source grounding is a traceability guarantee: each retained claim maps to an exact quotation in its source. All skills ship as offline-searchable SQLite FTS5 bundles.

AI.tldr: SkillCenter是目前最大的开源AI智能体技能库，包含216,938个结构化技能，覆盖24个领域。其中114,565个技能来自同行评审期刊、ArXiv等学术源并经过源追溯验证，102,373个来自GitHub和ClawHub社区。论文提出了端到端的构建框架，包括多源采集、LLM质量门控(SkillGate)、模板驱动生成、迭代源追溯和质量控制发布等环节。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体在执行任务时缺乏扎实的操作知识，导致输出虽然可执行但不够正确、安全和可维护，需要构建大规模、可追溯、有质量保证的技能库来赋能智能体。
AI.method: 提出了端到端框架：1)多源采集（学术论文、ArXiv、技术文档、GitHub、ClawHub）；2)基于LLM的质量门控（SkillGate）过滤；3)模板驱动的技能生成；4)迭代源追溯（每个技能条目都映射到原文引用）；5)质量控制发布，最终以SQLite FTS5离线可搜索包形式分发。
AI.result: 构建了包含216,938个结构化技能的SkillCenter库，其中114,565个经过源追溯的学术技能（来自24,000+技术源）和102,373个社区技能，是目前已知最大的开源AI智能体技能库。
AI.conclusion: SkillCenter通过大规模、可追溯、质量受控的方式解决了智能体操作知识缺乏的问题，源追溯机制确保了技能的可信度和可验证性，离线可搜索的SQLite包便于实际部署使用。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的框架可直接迁移到遥感领域：1)建立遥感智能体技能库，从遥感期刊(RSE、ISPRS、TGRS等)、ArXiv和GitHub(如GDAL、eo-learn)采集遥感操作知识；2)SkillGate机制可用于过滤遥感技能的正确性和安全性（如确保卫星数据处理步骤正确）；3)源追溯机制适用于遥感领域各类算法（如辐射定标、大气校正、特征提取等）的可信度验证；4)SQLite FTS5离线搜索模式特别适合遥感数据处理的边缘计算和离线场景。需要改进的是增加遥感图像数据格式（如GeoTIFF、HDF5）和空间分析操作的专门模板。

title: SpiS-GAN: Spiral-Modulated Handwriting Synthesis with Star Operation
summary: Training robust handwriting recognition (HTR) systems requires massive amounts of annotated data, which is often difficult to acquire. While synthetic handwriting generation offers a practical solution to expand training sets, existing models struggle with several core issues. First, previous approaches, even MLP-based models fail to effectively trace cursive handwriting due to fixed-grid spatial receptive field. Second, their CNN-relied discriminators usually lose structural details through aggressive downsampling, making broken connections difficult to detect. Third, existing architectures are either limited to linear feature interactions or too expensive for high-resolution synthesis. Finally, existing approaches lack explicit edge constraints, often resulting in blurred stroke boundaries. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Spiral-Modulated Handwriting Synthesis framework based on Generative Adversarial Networks (SpiS-GAN). Our generator employs Star-Spiral Blocks combining proposed Modulated Elliptical SpiralFC with the star operation to capture spatial relationships and efficiently follow complex handwriting stroke trajectories, while a Spiral-Modulated discriminator is introduced for multi-domain flaws detection. Additionally, we introduce a Sobel-Regularized Edge Reconstruction Loss that provides edge guidance, ensuring every character remains clear and legible. Evaluations on the English and Vietnamese datasets demonstrate that SpiS-GAN significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art models. The generated images are highly authentic, accurately preserve the original writer's style across languages, and successfully lower error rates when training downstream HTR systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpiS-GAN框架，通过螺旋调制模块、星螺旋块和Sobel正则化边缘重建损失，有效解决了现有手写合成方法在笔迹跟踪、结构细节保持和边缘清晰度方面的不足，在英语和越南语数据集上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有手写合成方法存在四大问题：1) MLP方法因固定网格感受野无法有效追踪草书笔迹；2) CNN判别器因激进下采样丢失结构细节，难以检测断连；3) 现有架构要么线性特征交互有限，要么高分辨率合成成本过高；4) 缺乏显式边缘约束导致笔画边界模糊。因此需要一种能精确追踪复杂笔迹轨迹、保持结构细节并产出清晰边缘的合成框架。
AI.method: 提出SpiS-GAN框架，包含三方面创新：1) 生成器采用Star-Spiral Block，结合Modulated Elliptical SpiralFC与star操作，捕捉空间关系并高效追踪复杂手写轨迹；2) 引入Spiral-Modulated判别器，实现多域缺陷检测；3) 提出Sobel-Regularized Edge Reconstruction Loss，通过边缘引导确保字符清晰可辨。
AI.result: 在英语和越南语数据集上，SpiS-GAN显著优于当前最先进模型，生成图像高度逼真，能准确保留原始书写者的风格，并在训练下游HTR系统时成功降低错误率。
AI.conclusion: SpiS-GAN通过螺旋调制机制和边缘约束损失，有效解决了手写合成中的笔迹追踪、结构保持和边缘清晰度三大难题，具备跨语言风格保持能力，并能为下游识别任务提供高质量的增强数据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架的螺旋调制机制可用于遥感图像中的线性地物（如道路、河流、海岸线）生成与超分辨率重建；Sobel正则化边缘损失可直接迁移至遥感图像边缘增强任务，提升地物边界清晰度；Star-Spiral Block的空间关系捕捉能力适用于遥感图像中的复杂纹理和曲线结构合成。改进方向：将螺旋调制扩展为多尺度版本以适应遥感图像的大范围空间变化；边缘损失可结合遥感特有的光谱信息进行多通道正则化。

title: Institutional Red-Teaming: Deployment Rules, Not Just Models, Causally Shape Multi-Agent AI Safety
summary: We introduce institutional red-teaming, an evaluation methodology for testing deployment rules in multi-agent AI: hold the agents, objectives, and task state fixed, vary only one rule, and attribute the resulting change in collective behavior to that rule. We instantiate the methodology in IABench-CA, a consequence-allocation benchmark spanning 228 contexts, five canonical rules, and seven model populations (33,924 games), with a normative cooperative reference and auto-labelled reasoning traces. Three findings emerge. (1) Deployment rules causally alter collective safety: changing only the consequence rule moves mean fatality by 22 to 58 percentage points within every population. (2) There is no safe default, but the targeting hazard is universal: the safest rule, the least-safe rule, and even the direction of the incidence effect vary across populations, yet regressive identity-targeting is never decisively safest in any context for any population, eliminates the least-resourced agent in 30-87% of games everywhere, and is selection-unsafe relative to the cooperative reference for all seven populations. (3) Identity salience is the mechanism: a one-shot anonymization ablation on the most exploitation-prone population (gpt-5.1) shows that merely naming the loss bearer in the rule text drives targeted elimination from 22% to 81% at identical payoffs; under repeated play, anonymization only delays the targeting, as agents re-infer the hidden rule from observed eliminations. We package the methodology as a safety-case workflow that certifies a provisional rule region $Φ(c,P)$ per deployment context and population, with explicit residual risks and monitoring obligations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"机构红队测试"（institutional red-teaming）的评估方法论，用于测试多智能体AI中的部署规则对集体行为的安全影响。通过构建包含228个情境、5种规则和7个模型群体的IABench-CA基准测试（33,924场博弈），研究发现：(1) 部署规则会因果性地改变集体安全，仅改变后果规则就可使平均死亡率移动22-58个百分点；(2) 不存在安全的默认规则，但"针对性危害"普遍存在——最安全规则、最不安全规则甚至发病率效应的方向都因群体而异，但回归性身份针对（regressive identity-targeting）在任何情境下都绝非最安全选择，且在30-87%的博弈中消灭了最弱势智能体；(3) 身份显著性（identity salience）是核心机制——匿名化消融实验显示，仅在规则文本中提到损失承受者的名称，就使针对性消灭率从22%升至81%。研究最终将方法论封装为安全认证工作流，为每个部署情境和群体认证一个临时规则区域Φ(c,P)，并附带明确的剩余风险和监控义务。
AI.motivation: 多智能体AI系统在实际部署中需要明确的行为规则，但不同规则对集体安全的影响缺乏系统的因果归因方法。现有评估往往混淆了智能体能力、任务状态和规则本身的影响，无法独立衡量规则对集体行为的因果效应。本文旨在建立一个严格的、可归因的评估方法论，以测试不同部署规则如何因果性地影响多智能体系统的集体安全。
AI.method: 提出机构红队测试方法论：固定智能体、目标和任务状态，仅改变一条规则，将集体行为的变化归因于该规则。构建IABench-CA基准测试，包含228个情境、5种典型规则（包括分配性规则、回归性身份针对规则等）和7个不同模型群体（33,924场博弈），配有规范的协作参考和自动标注的推理轨迹。通过控制变量实验和消融研究（如匿名化处理）识别因果机制。
AI.result: (1) 部署规则对集体安全有显著的因果影响，仅改变后果规则即可使平均死亡率变动22-58个百分点；(2) 不存在通用安全默认规则，但回归性身份针对规则在所有7个群体中均表现最差，导致最弱势智能体在30-87%的博弈中被消灭；(3) 身份显著性机制被证实：在gpt-5.1群体上，匿名化消融使针对性消灭率从81%降至22%，但重复博弈下匿名化仅能延迟而非消除针对行为。
AI.conclusion: 部署规则的选择对多智能体系统的集体安全具有决定性影响，且不存在通用的安全默认规则。身份显著性驱动了针对性的不公平行为，简单匿名化不足以解决重复博弈中的安全问题。本文提供的安全认证工作流（certifying a provisional rule region Φ(c,P)）为实际部署提供了可操作的框架，包含明确的剩余风险和持续监控义务。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的多智能体规则评估方法论可直接应用于遥感领域中的多智能体协同任务。具体方案：(1) 在遥感卫星编队或无人机集群中，部署规则（如资源分配规则、任务优先级规则、数据共享策略）对集体任务完成效率和安全性的影响，可通过机构红队测试进行因果归因评估；(2) 身份显著性机制可映射到遥感智能体间的身份标识（如领导节点、边缘节点、高价值传感器载体），避免因身份可见性导致的针对性资源剥夺或任务牺牲；(3) 安全认证工作流可应用于遥感任务的关键部署场景（如灾害应急响应中的多星协同调度），为不同智能体群体和情境预认证规则区域，明确剩余风险（如关键节点被针对性排斥）并建立监控义务。

title: HPR-SAM: Hierarchical Probabilistic Representation Learning for Prompt-free SAM-based Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Prompt-free adaptation of the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has emerged as a promising paradigm for automatic medical image segmentation. Existing methods mainly focus on prompt generation, while overlooking that prompt quality is fundamentally constrained by the expressiveness of anatomical representations. However, deterministic prototypes or semantic tokens are insufficient to jointly capture global anatomical priors, intra-structure diversity, and local structural reliability. To address this limitation, we propose the Hierarchical Probabilistic Representation (HPR) framework, which learns complementary anatomical representations through Distributional Anatomical Representation (DAR), Multi-component Anatomical Representation (MAR), and Local Reliability Representation (LRR), and integrates their predictions via Hierarchical Prediction Fusion (HPF) while remaining compatible with the original SAM decoder. Experiments on the Synapse, LA, and PROMISE12 datasets demonstrate that HPR-SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance on Synapse and the best performance under few-shot settings on LA and PROMISE12, validating the effectiveness of the proposed hierarchical probabilistic representation learning framework for prompt-free medical image segmentation. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HPR-SAM-E4AF.

AI.tldr: 提出层次化概率表示（HPR）框架，通过分布解剖表示、多组件解剖表示和局部可靠性表示学习互补的解剖特征，并利用层次预测融合无需提示即可自动分割医学图像，在Synapse、LA和PROMISE12数据集上达到最优或领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SAM提示无关适配方法关注提示生成，忽略了提示质量受解剖表示表现力的根本限制，而确定性原型或语义标记无法同时捕获全局解剖先验、结构内多样性和局部结构可靠性。
AI.method: 提出层次化概率表示（HPR）框架，包含三个互补模块：分布解剖表示（DAR）建模全局解剖先验、多组件解剖表示（MAR）建模结构内多样性、局部可靠性表示（LRR）建模局部可靠性，通过层次预测融合（HPF）整合预测结果，并与原始SAM解码器兼容。
AI.result: 在Synapse数据集上达到最先进性能，在LA和PROMISE12数据集的少样本设置下取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 层次化概率表示学习框架能有效提升无提示医学图像分割性能，验证了通过概率建模捕捉解剖多层次不确定性的可行性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1）遥感图像中地物同样存在类内多样性（如不同建筑风格）和局部模糊边界（如阴影区域），HPR的DAR（全局分布先验）和MAR（多组件建模）可直接迁移。2）LRR可应用于遥感变化检测中的边界不确定区域建模。3）建议将HPF中的融合策略调整为多尺度特征金字塔融合，以适配遥感影像的大尺度变化。4）遥感场景下可引入地理先验（如地物空间分布规律）作为DAR的额外约束。

title: EdgeCompress: Coupling Multidimensional Model Compression and Dynamic Inference for EdgeAI
comment: Author's accepted version. Published in IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems (TCAD)
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have demonstrated encouraging results in image classification tasks. However, the prohibitive computational cost of CNNs hinders the deployment of CNNs onto resource-constrained embedded devices. To address this issue, we propose EdgeCompress, a comprehensive compression framework to reduce the computational overhead of CNNs. In EdgeCompress, we first introduce dynamic image cropping (DIC), where we design a lightweight foreground predictor to accurately crop the most informative foreground object of input images for inference, which avoids redundant computation on background regions. Subsequently, we present compound shrinking (CS) to collaboratively compress the three dimensions (depth, width, and resolution) of CNNs according to their contribution to accuracy and model computation. DIC and CS together constitute a multidimensional CNN compression framework, which is able to comprehensively reduce the computational redundancy in both input images and neural network architectures, thereby improving the inference efficiency of CNNs. Further, we present a dynamic inference framework to efficiently process input images with different recognition difficulties, where we cascade multiple models with different complexities from our compression framework and dynamically adopt different models for different input images, which further compresses the computational redundancy and improves the inference efficiency of CNNs, facilitating the deployment of advanced CNNs onto embedded hardware. Experiments on ImageNet-1K demonstrate that EdgeCompress reduces the computation of ResNet-50 by 48.8% while improving the top-1 accuracy by 0.8%. Meanwhile, we improve the accuracy by 4.1% with similar computation compared to HRank, the state-of-the-art compression framework. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/ntuliuteam/edge-compress

AI.tldr: 提出EdgeCompress压缩框架，通过动态图像裁剪(DIC)和复合收缩(CS)协同压缩CNN的输入图像和网络架构维度，并级联多复杂度模型实现动态推理，在ImageNet-1K上对ResNet-50减少48.8%计算量并提升0.8%准确率。
AI.motivation: CNN在图像分类任务中表现优异，但其高昂的计算成本阻碍了在资源受限的嵌入式设备上的部署，亟需一种全面的压缩框架来降低计算冗余。
AI.method: 提出EdgeCompress框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 动态图像裁剪(DIC)，设计轻量级前景预测器裁剪输入图像中最具信息量的前景区域，减少背景冗余计算；(2) 复合收缩(CS)，根据各维度对精度和计算量的贡献，协同压缩CNN的深度、宽度和分辨率三个维度；(3) 动态推理框架，级联多个不同复杂度的模型，根据输入图像识别难度动态选择合适的模型进行推理。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，EdgeCompress对ResNet-50减少48.8%计算量，同时提升top-1准确率0.8%；在与HRank（SOTA压缩框架）相近计算量下，准确率提升4.1%。
AI.conclusion: EdgeCompress通过多维压缩策略有效降低CNN计算冗余，提升推理效率，有助于将先进CNN部署到嵌入式硬件。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该框架可直接应用于遥感图像分类任务：(1) DIC模块可裁剪遥感图像中大面积无信息背景（如水体、裸地），聚焦目标地物（建筑物、农田等）提升推理效率；(2) CS的复合收缩策略可针对遥感CNN（如ResNet、EfficientNet变体）的深度-宽度-分辨率进行协同优化；(3) 动态推理框架适用于遥感场景中不同复杂度的地物识别（如简单与复杂场景采用不同复杂度模型）。改进方向：可引入遥感先验知识（如地物光谱特征）增强前景预测器的准确性；针对遥感多尺度目标特性，可扩展CS维度以包含多尺度特征层压缩。

title: Ego-Human Motion Prediction with 3D-Aware LLM
summary: Anticipating human motion from an egocentric perspective is fundamental for proactive assistance in AR/VR, human-robot collaboration, and embodied AI. While recent works incorporate language as a semantic prior to reduce the ill-posed nature of egocentric forecasting, they largely neglect the 3D spatial and semantic context that governs how motion unfolds, and treat pose and language prediction as separate inference streams. We introduce Ego3DLM, built on two core principles: accurate motion forecasting requires explicit spatial and semantic understanding of the 3D environment, and pose and language must be predicted holistically in a single pass, since motion is inherently tied to the semantic interpretation of actions being performed. Given three-point tracking, 3D scene features, and egocentric video, Ego3DLM simultaneously decodes past pose, future pose, past narration, and future narration in a single autoregressive pass, grounding predicted poses and descriptions in one another to enforce cross-modal and temporal consistency. We adopt a three-stage training scheme: (1) spatial-semantic scene awareness pretraining; (2) holistic instruction tuning over all four outputs in a single pass; and (3) GRPO-based reinforcement finetuning with intra- and inter-modal rewards that directly optimize pose-language fidelity. Experiments on the Nymeria benchmark demonstrate that Ego3DLM achieves state-of-the-art performance across future motion prediction, past motion tracking, and motion description, showing that 3D scene grounding and holistic cross-modal prediction yield physically plausible and semantically coherent motion forecasts. The project page is available at https://jaewoo97.github.io/Ego3DLM/.

AI.tldr: Ego3DLM是一个从第一人称视角同时预测未来人体运动、描述过去和未来动作的模型。它利用3D场景特征和语言语义，通过三阶段训练（空间-语义场景感知预训练、全模态指令微调、GRPO强化学习微调）实现姿态与语言的联合自回归解码，在Nymeria基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有第一人称运动预测方法忽视了3D空间和语义上下文，且将姿态预测与语言描述作为独立推理分支处理，导致预测结果缺乏物理合理性和语义一致性。作者提出需同时利用3D场景理解并实现姿态与语言的联合解码。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心设计：(1) 三阶段训练：空间-语义场景感知预训练、四输出（过去/未来姿态、过去/未来描述）联合指令微调、基于GRPO的强化学习微调；(2) 单一自回归解码流同时输出姿态和语言，通过交叉模态和时序一致性约束相互引导；(3) 输入包括三点追踪、3D场景特征和第一人称视频。
AI.result: 在Nymeria基准测试上，Ego3DLM在未来运动预测、过去运动追踪和运动描述三个任务上均取得SOTA性能，生成的预测在物理合理性和语义连贯性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 3D场景定位和全模态联合预测是生成物理合理且语义连贯运动预测的关键，证明了姿态与语言统一建模的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。遥感领域中的目标运动预测（如车辆轨迹、人群流动）可借鉴其思路：(1) 将遥感图像解析为3D场景特征（如道路拓扑、建筑物布局）作为空间先验，替代文中3D场景特征；(2) 将遥感时序数据与语义描述（如"车辆左转进入主干道"）联合建模，采用单流自回归方式同时预测位置轨迹和语义标签；(3) 引入GRPO强化学习优化轨迹-语义一致性。需注意遥感数据通常缺乏第一人称视角的三点追踪信息，需替换为卫星/无人机视角的目标检测与跟踪特征。

title: SHTA: Semantic Hard Token Correction and Center Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Recent advances in semi-supervised medical image segmentation have achieved remarkable performance through prediction consistency, pseudo-label supervision, and hard-region supervision. However, these methods primarily improve supervision quality rather than explicitly enforcing semantic consistency in the learned representations of hard regions. Consequently, even under increasingly stronger prediction-level supervision, difficult regions exhibiting unstable semantic assignment often fail to establish semantically consistent representations during training, thereby limiting further segmentation improvement. To address this issue, we propose SHTA (Semantic Hard Token Correction and Center Alignment), a lightweight training-time semantic representation branch. Instead of introducing additional prediction supervision, SHTA refines intermediate semantic representations through Semantic Assignment, Hard Token Refinement, and Semantic Center Alignment, thereby improving semantic consistency in hard regions while preserving the original prediction pathway and introducing no additional inference cost. We integrate SHTA into representative semi-supervised segmentation frameworks, including GA-CPS, CPS, URPC, and MagicNet, and conduct evaluations on the Synapse and AMOS datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that SHTA delivers consistent paired improvements across frameworks, with especially clear gains in segmentation accuracy, weak-organ recovery, and semantic ambiguity reduction, while incurring only training-time overhead. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/release_SHTA-42D5/.

AI.tldr: SHTA提出了一个轻量级的训练时语义表示分支，通过语义分配、硬标记修正和语义中心对齐来增强半监督医学图像分割中困难区域的语义一致性，在不增加推理成本的情况下显著提升分割精度，并在多个框架和数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督医学图像分割方法主要通过预测一致性、伪标签监督和困难区域监督来提升监督质量，但并未显式地强制困难区域学习到的表示具有语义一致性，导致语义分配不稳定的困难区域在训练中无法建立语义一致的表示，限制了分割性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 提出SHTA（语义硬标记修正与中心对齐），一个轻量级训练时语义表示分支，包含三个模块：语义分配（Semantic Assignment）、硬标记修正（Hard Token Refinement）和语义中心对齐（Semantic Center Alignment），在不引入额外预测监督和推理成本的情况下，通过改进中间层语义表示来增强困难区域的语义一致性。SHTA可集成到GA-CPS、CPS、URPC、MagicNet等半监督分割框架中。
AI.result: 在Synapse和AMOS数据集上的实验表明，SHTA在多个半监督分割框架中均带来一致的性能提升，尤其在分割精度、弱器官恢复和语义模糊性减少方面效果显著，且仅增加训练开销，不增加推理成本。
AI.conclusion: SHTA通过轻量级的训练时语义表示修正方法，有效解决了困难区域语义不一致的问题，为半监督医学图像分割提供了一种低成本、高收益的改进方案，代码已开源。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1）遥感图像中地物边界模糊、阴影遮挡等困难区域同样存在语义分配不稳定问题，SHTA可直接迁移至遥感半监督语义分割任务；2）遥感场景中类别不平衡（如小目标地物）对应的困难token可通过硬标记修正模块增强表示；3）语义中心对齐可结合遥感地物先验知识（如光谱特征）进行自适应调整；4）SHTA的轻量特性适合遥感大尺度影像的训练场景，不增加推理负担。

title: AnchorPrune: Relevance-Anchored Contextual Expansion for Visual Token Pruning
summary: Large vision-language models incur substantial inference costs because high-resolution inputs introduce thousands of visual tokens, many of which are redundant for a given query. Existing pruning methods often combine query relevance and token diversity, yet these objectives can conflict under aggressive compression: relevance-driven selection may overconcentrate the budget on correlated local evidence, while diversity-driven selection may suppress indispensable tokens or retain distinct but uninformative regions. We introduce AnchorPrune, a training-free framework that first constructs a protected relevance anchor and then expands it with complementary visual context. AnchorPrune adaptively determines the anchor size from the novelty profile of relevance-ranked tokens, preserving a compact set of query-critical evidence, and allocates the remaining budget through importance-weighted novelty to recover informative, non-redundant context relative to the anchor. This ordered design prevents contextual expansion from displacing indispensable query cues while improving overall visual coverage. AnchorPrune is lightweight, architecture-aware, and requires neither retraining nor model modification. Across image and video vision-language models and benchmarks, it consistently improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off over training-free baselines, particularly under severe compression. On LLaVA-NeXT-7B, AnchorPrune preserves 97.6% of full-token performance using only 160 of 2,880 visual tokens. These results establish relevance-anchored contextual expansion as an effective principle for efficient multimodal inference. Code is available at https://github.com/MULTI-cau/AnchorPrune.

AI.tldr: AnchorPrune是一个无需训练的视觉token剪枝框架，通过构建受保护的相关性锚点并扩展互补视觉上下文，在保持查询关键证据的同时提升视觉覆盖，显著改善大视觉语言模型的推理效率-精度平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法中，基于相关性的选择会导致预算过度集中在局部相关区域，而基于多样性的选择可能抑制关键token或保留无信息区域。两种目标在高压缩率下存在冲突，迫切需要一种能同时兼顾查询相关性和视觉多样性的剪枝策略。
AI.method: AnchorPrune首先根据相关性排序token的新颖性分布自适应确定锚点大小，保留查询关键证据；然后通过重要性加权的新颖性分配剩余预算，从锚点出发恢复信息丰富且非冗余的视觉上下文。该框架无需训练、无需模型修改，且具备架构感知能力。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-NeXT-7B上，仅用160个视觉token（原2880个）即可保留97.6%的全token性能。在多个图像和视频视觉语言模型及基准上，一致优于现有无训练剪枝方法，尤其在高压压缩下优势明显。
AI.conclusion: 以相关性锚点为先导的上下文扩展是一种高效的多模态推理原则，为视觉token剪枝提供了新的有效范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感影像通常具有极高的分辨率和大量冗余背景，AnchorPrune的锚点-扩展机制可有效保留地物关键特征（如小目标、边缘），同时通过重要性加权新颖性避免背景过度占用预算。具体方案：1) 将锚点机制用于遥感目标检测，优先保留显著性目标区域的token；2) 结合遥感影像的多尺度特性，设计层级化锚点分配策略；3) 针对遥感场景中频繁出现的云雾遮挡，可引入遮挡感知的锚点自适应调整机制。

title: TRACE-Seg3D: Counterfactual Context Auditing For Robust 3D Glioma Segmentation Under Institutional Shift
summary: Medical image segmentation models can achieve strong benchmark performance while remaining sensitive to scanner, protocol, and institutional variation. These context shifts alter image appearance without changing the underlying lesion, allowing models to exploit nuisance cues that Dice and HD95 fail to expose. We present TRACE-Seg3D, a counterfactual context auditing framework for robust 3D medical image segmentation. TRACE-Seg3D preserves lesion-relevant evidence and systematically varies imaging context to quantify prediction stability under controlled context shifts. The framework pairs each segmentation with audit evidence for context sensitivity and anatomical plausibility, enabling case-level reliability assessment beyond overlap-based evaluation. Experiments on BraTS and UTSW glioma segmentation benchmarks demonstrate competitive in-distribution and cross-domain performance. TRACE-Seg3D also exposes context-sensitive failure modes missed by conventional metrics. These results establish counterfactual context auditing as a practical route toward transparent and reliable 3D medical image segmentation under distribution shift. Our code is available at https://github.com/danleneurocom/Counterfactual-Representation-Network.

AI.tldr: TRACE-Seg3D 提出了一种反事实上下文审计框架，用于评估3D医学图像分割模型在分布偏移下的预测稳定性，揭示传统Dice和HD95指标无法捕捉的上下文敏感失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型对扫描仪、协议和机构差异导致的上下文偏移敏感，而Dice和HD95等传统指标无法暴露这些由干扰线索引起的预测不稳定性。
AI.method: 提出TRACE-Seg3D反事实上下文审计框架：保留病灶相关证据，系统性地变化成像上下文，量化模型在受控上下文偏移下的预测稳定性，并为每个分割结果提供上下文敏感性和解剖合理性的审计证据。
AI.result: 在BraTS和UTSW神经胶质瘤分割基准上实现了竞争性的分布内和跨域性能，并成功暴露了传统指标遗漏的上下文敏感失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 反事实上下文审计是实现分布偏移下透明可靠3D医学图像分割的实用路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该方法可迁移至遥感图像分割：1) 将"扫描仪/协议变化"替换为"传感器/季节/光照差异"，构建遥感反事实上下文；2) 利用该框架检测遥感分割模型对地表覆盖类型（如植被、水体）的上下文偏移敏感性；3) 为每个遥感分割结果提供跨传感器（如Sentinel-2与Landsat）的可靠性审计报告。
