DualAlign also remains robust under missing-modality and label-scarce conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DualAlign，一种两阶段多模态融合框架，通过自适应对齐解决动作质量评估中跨模态错位和标注成本高的问题。在自建数据集MM-JDM上平均相关性提升21.16%，在现有基准上也有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有动作质量评估方法面临两大挑战：1) 异构多模态数据存在跨模态错位和不稳定融合问题；2) 多模态标注成本高，导致数据集多样性受限。
AI.method: 提出DualAlign两阶段融合框架：第一阶段通过最大化RGB视频、光流和骨架模态间的共享结构信息构建一致的视觉表征；第二阶段在视觉稳定后引入文本语义，使高层描述补充而非扭曲底层视觉流形。同时构建了包含四种模态且具有模态噪声、类别不平衡和标签稀缺特性的MM-JDM数据集。
AI.result: 在MM-JDM数据集上平均相关性比SOTA提升21.16%，在RG和Fis-V基准上分别提升3.53%和5.95%，且在缺失模态和标签稀缺条件下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DualAlign通过自适应对齐策略有效解决了多模态融合中的错位问题，验证了先对齐视觉模态再引入文本语义的两阶段策略的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域可借鉴该思路：1) 将RGB、高光谱、SAR、LiDAR等异源遥感数据替代原文中的RGB/光流/骨架模态，第一阶段最大化共享结构信息；2) 第二阶段引入地理文本描述（如地物类型、变化语义）作为高层语义引导；3) 遥感多模态数据同样存在标注稀缺问题，DualAlign的标签稀缺鲁棒性可直接迁移至遥感场景分类与变化检测任务。

title: A Theory of Contrastive Learning with Natural Images
summary: Why does contrastive learning with simple images and augmentations yield useful representations for downstream tasks? We address this question by analytically computing the optimal representation in terms of a contrastive loss for a range of basic augmentations and any image dataset with stationary statistics. We show that for certain augmentations the optimum can be attained by a CNN whose first layer filters are sinusoids, followed by a pointwise nonlinearity, global average pooling, and a final linear layer that performs partial whitening. We also show that the optimal weights in such CNNs for more complicated augmentations are still sinusoids. The frequencies of the sinusoids and their weights can be computed using a simple waterfilling algorithm given the dataset's expected power spectrum. Experiments with different image datasets and augmentations show that such CNNs trained with SGD empirically learn sinusoids in their first layer and to perform partial whitening

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析证明，在简单图像增强和对比学习下，最优表示可由第一层为正弦滤波器、后接逐点非线性、全局平均池化和部分白化的CNN实现，并可通过注水算法根据数据集功率谱计算最优频率和权重。
AI.motivation: 回答对比学习为何能从简单图像和增强中学习到有用的下游表示，从理论上揭示其内在机制。
AI.method: 通过解析计算对比损失下的最优表示，假设图像数据具有平稳统计特性，推导出最优CNN架构的各层形式，并利用注水算法计算正弦滤波器频率和权重。
AI.result: 1) 最优表示可由特定结构的CNN实现，其第一层滤波器为 sinusoids；2) 更复杂增强下最优权重仍为正弦波；3) 频率和权重可通过注水算法由数据集功率谱计算；4) SGD训练可经验性地学到正弦滤波器和部分白化。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习在简单增强下学习到的表示具有可解析的理论最优形式，为理解对比学习的成功提供了理论依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像通常具有丰富的周期性纹理（如农田、城市布局）和空间自相关特性，该理论可直接应用：1) 利用遥感图像的多波段功率谱计算最优正弦滤波器，设计专用于遥感对比学习的CNN前端；2) 将水坝算法扩展到多光谱/高光谱场景，按波段重要性分配频率资源；3) 结合遥感图像特有的空间尺度特性（不同地物在不同尺度下呈现不同周期性），设计多尺度正弦滤波器组。

title: Discovering Geometric Biases in 3D Face Reconstruction: A Curvature-Aware Spectral Framework for Fairness Evaluation
summary: 3D Morphable Models (3DMMs) remain the standard parametric shape priors for many state-of-the-art 3D face reconstruction algorithms. However, as these models are derived from a finite number of 3D face samples, they inherit the morphological biases of their training data, potentially limiting their generalizability across diverse global populations. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to analyze 3DMM reconstructions through the lens of surface curvature, with the objective to discover, quantify and visualize biases. While standard evaluation metrics often rely on Euclidean distances, our reconstruction error captures subtle surface nuances such as local topology or undulations. To do so, we leverage the Laplace-Beltrami Operator (LBO) to generate high-resolution curvature error maps, providing a localized and geometrically meaningful visualization of discrepancies between ground truth faces and reconstructed meshes. We derive from it an error metric that we validated through a user study, observing a significantly higher correlation to human perception compared to traditional methods. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments across several 3DMM bases and fitting algorithms, uncovering systematic age-related biases and providing preliminary evidence of biases associated with gender and ethnicity. Our findings highlight the necessity of adopting curvature-aware evaluation protocols to ensure demographic fairness and geometric precision in future 3D face reconstruction research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于表面曲率的三维形变模型(3DMM)重建偏差分析框架，利用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子(LBO)生成高分辨率曲率误差图，揭示了现有3DMM在年龄、性别和种族方面的系统性偏差，并验证了曲率感知评估指标比传统欧氏距离更符合人类感知。
AI.motivation: 现存的3DMM重建评估主要依赖欧氏距离，无法捕捉表面细微几何特征(如局部拓扑、起伏)，且模型因训练数据有限而存在人口统计学偏差，但缺乏有效的偏差发现和量化方法。
AI.method: 1) 基于LBO生成高分辨率曲率误差图，提供局部化和几何上有意义的偏差可视化；2) 推导出新的曲率误差指标，并通过用户研究验证其与人类感知的相关性高于传统方法；3) 在多个3DMM基库和拟合算法上进行广泛实验。
AI.result: 发现了系统性的年龄相关偏差，以及性别和种族偏差的初步证据；提出的曲率误差指标比传统欧氏距离指标与人类感知的相关性显著更高。
AI.conclusion: 未来3D人脸重建研究应采用曲率感知的评估协议，以确保人口统计学的公平性和几何精度。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域中的三维重建(如LiDAR点云或立体影像生成的地形/建筑物模型)同样面临模型偏差和几何精度评估问题。可将本文的LBO曲率误差分析方法引入遥感三维重建评估：1) 用曲率误差图替代传统高程均方根误差(RMSE)，更精细地捕捉地形起伏和建筑物边缘的局部几何偏差；2) 对DEM/DSM重建模型进行人口统计学无关的偏差分析(如区域地形类型、城市/乡村地貌差异)；3) 曲率感知指标可用于评估不同遥感三维重建算法在不同地理区域和地物类型上的公平性表现。

title: Learning to Unify Deformable Shape and Texture Representations for Cardiac Video Classification
summary: Deformable shape representations have proven to be robust complements to texture features in cardiac image classification, offering geometric priors that are invariant to imaging artifacts and intensity variations. However, existing deep networks perform simple concatenation to combine these distinct feature representations, which neither fully exploits their complementary nature nor learns cross-modal feature dependencies. Furthermore, this results in uniform attention across all timepoints; hence ignoring the varying diagnostic importance across the cardiac phases. In this paper, we propose a novel cardiac video classification model that, for the first time, learns temporal features in an integrated space of deformable shape and image texture representations. In particular, we design a bi-directional cross-attention in the latent space to fuse latent deformable shape and image features, allowing each modality to adaptively weight the other based on spatio-temporal correspondence. In contrast to current methods that apply uniform weighting across all the cardiac phases, our approach learns to dynamically adjust the contributions of shape and texture representations, derived from images, over time. We demonstrate state-of-the-art classification performance on a cine cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) video dataset, achieving improved interpretability from attention mechanisms that identify diagnostically critical cardiac phases and modality contributions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于心脏视频分类的模型，首次在可变形形状和图像纹理的联合嵌入空间中学习时序特征，通过双向交叉注意力机制实现跨模态自适应加权，并在心脏磁共振视频数据集上取得了最优分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度网络简单拼接形状与纹理特征，未能充分利用二者的互补性，且对所有时间点施加均匀注意力，忽略了不同心脏相位在诊断中的重要程度差异。
AI.method: 设计双向交叉注意力机制在潜在空间中融合可变形形状与图像纹理特征，使每种模态根据时空对应关系自适应地为另一种模态加权，并动态调整各心脏相位上形状与纹理表示的贡献。
AI.result: 在电影心脏磁共振视频数据集上取得了最先进的分类性能，注意力机制能够识别诊断关键的心脏相位及各模态贡献，提升了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的跨模态融合与动态时序加权策略有效提升了心脏视频分类性能与可解释性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感时序分类（如农作物物候识别、城市变化检测）同样面临多模态特征（光谱-空间-时序）融合及不同时相重要性不均的问题。可将本文的双向交叉注意力机制迁移至遥感领域，用于融合高光谱纹理特征与地物几何形状特征（如建筑物轮廓、植被冠层结构），并针对不同物候期或变化阶段动态调整模态贡献权重。此外，该方法的可解释性有助于识别遥感时序中的关键观测时相。

title: Context-Aware Slum Mapping in Sub-Saharan Africa Using Sentinel-1 Texture and Local Climate Zones
comment: Submitted to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing (JSTARS) for possible publication
summary: Accurate mapping of informal settlements remains a major challenge in Sub-Saharan African (SSA) cities because optical imagery often fails to distinguish Informal Settlements (defined here as LCZ 7) from spectrally similar formal Compact Low-Rise areas (LCZ 3). This study presents a context-aware, reproducible Optical-SAR framework that improves informal settlement delineation using Sentinel-2 spectral features and Sentinel-1 structural information within an adapted Local Climate Zone (LCZ) taxonomy. We implement a three-tier SAR integration strategy: calibrated backscatter, GLCM textures, and a physics-guided feature engineered to capture the high structural disorder and weak radar return characteristic of SSA informal settlements. Using reference data across Nairobi and Eldoret (Kenya), we evaluate performance via a stratified hold-out protocol and a season-aware ablation study. Results show that SAR textures provide the dominant performance gain for LCZ 7 detection. The Optical-SAR model achieves overall accuracy of 0.816 (dry) and 0.807 (wet), significantly outperforming the WUDAPT baseline (OA 0.704) and reducing the critical LCZ 3 - LCZ 7 confusion to 7%. Seasonal analysis indicates that while optical-only separability varies with phenology, SAR-derived textures stabilize informal settlement mapping across seasons. These findings demonstrate that the incorporation of SAR-derived features yields consistent improvements for urban morphology mapping in data-scarce environments across seasons and across the evaluated source cities, while cross-city transfer remains limited without local adaptation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合Sentinel-2光谱特征和Sentinel-1结构信息的光学-SAR融合框架，用于改进撒哈拉以南非洲城市中非正规住区（LCZ 7）的精细制图。通过三级SAR集成策略（校准后向散射、GLCM纹理和物理引导特征工程），在肯尼亚内罗毕和埃尔多雷特实现了0.816（旱季）和0.807（雨季）的总体精度，显著优于WUDAPT基线（0.704），并将LCZ 3与LCZ 7的混淆度降低至7%。SAR纹理特征对非正规住区检测贡献最大，且跨季节稳定性好，但跨城市泛化仍需本地适应策略。
AI.motivation: 光学遥感影像在撒哈拉以南非洲城市中难以区分非正规住区（LCZ 7）与光谱相似的低层紧凑建成区（LCZ 3），传统制图方法精度不足且缺乏可复现性，亟需一种结合SAR数据、上下文感知且跨季节鲁棒的自动化制图框架。
AI.method: 基于Sentinel-2光谱特征和Sentinel-1结构信息，在改进的局部气候区（LCZ）分类体系下，实施了三级SAR集成策略：(1) 校准后向散射系数；(2) GLCM纹理特征；(3) 物理引导的工程特征（捕捉非正规住区的高结构无序性和弱雷达回波特性）。采用分层留出验证协议和季节感知消融实验进行评估。
AI.result: 光学-SAR模型旱季总体精度0.816，雨季0.807，显著优于WUDAPT基线（0.704）；LCZ 3与LCZ 7的混淆度降至7%；SAR纹理特征对LCZ 7检测贡献最大；光学特征可分性随物候变化，而SAR纹理特征可跨季节稳定制图；跨城市迁移能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 融合SAR衍生特征能在数据稀缺环境中实现跨季节一致的城市形态制图改进，但跨城市应用仍需本地适应策略。SAR纹理特征是提升非正规住区检测精度的关键因子。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可引入更高级的SAR极化分解特征（如Freeman-Durden分解）替代简单后向散射，以增强对非正规住区高熵散射特征的刻画；(2) 物理引导特征可进一步结合深度学习（如CNN或Transformer）自动学习非正规住区的空间结构模式，减少手动特征工程的局限性；(3) 跨城市迁移限制问题可通过域自适应技术（如对抗性域对齐或自监督预训练）缓解；(4) 可扩展至其他光谱相似的城市类别区分（如工业区与贫民窟），以及结合高时间分辨率数据（如Sentinel-1时序）进行非正规住区动态监测。

title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions
summary: We present LingBot-World 2.0 (also known as LingBot-World-Infinity), an advanced iteration of LingBot-World featuring four distinct upgrades. (1) Our model achieves an unbounded interaction horizon while maintaining consistent output quality, benefiting from a carefully crafted causal pretraining paradigm. (2) Through distilling a real-time variant from the base model, our system guarantees rapid response time, sufficient to drive 720p video streams at 60 fps. (3) Compared to the previous version, this update introduces highly diverse interactive elements, comprising a broader spectrum of actions (e.g., attacking, archery, spell-casting, and shooting) alongside a richer variety of text-driven events. (4) We pioneer the integration of an agentic harness within the domain of world modeling, wherein a pilot agent is tasked with planning and executing character behaviors, while a director agent is responsible for synthesizing novel environmental elements as the scene progresses. Additionally, to facilitate a shared experience, we develop an interface that permits multiple players to simultaneously immerse themselves in this vivid world simulator. We pair our primary 14B model with a lightweight 1.3B counterpart, which supports effortless deployment on a single GPU.

AI.tldr: LingBot-World 2.0 是一个具备无限交互时长、实时响应、丰富交互元素和智能体协作架构的世界模拟器，支持多玩家同时在线体验，并提供14B主模型与1.3B轻量版模型。
AI.motivation: 在先前版本的基础上，扩展交互时长至无界、提升响应速度到60fps、增加更多交互动作与事件类型，并首次将智能体架构引入世界建模，以实现更动态和沉浸的虚拟世界体验。
AI.method: 采用因果预训练范式实现无限交互时长；从基模型蒸馏出实时变体确保60fps的720p视频流响应；引入行动（攻击、射箭、施法、射击等）和文本驱动事件；设计pilot agent规划角色行为、director agent合成新场景元素；开发多玩家共享界面。
AI.result: 实现无界交互时长、60fps实时响应、丰富多样的交互元素和多玩家同时沉浸体验；提供14B主模型和可单GPU部署的1.3B轻量模型。
AI.conclusion: LingBot-World 2.0 在交互时长、响应速度、内容多样性和架构创新上均有显著提升，为世界模拟器领域提供了新的技术范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。该工作提出的智能体协作架构（pilot agent规划、director agent动态合成场景）可迁移至遥感领域，用于构建动态环境模拟器，如模拟遥感传感器在不同地形、天气、光照条件下的影像生成；因果预训练范式可用于遥感时序数据的无界建模，提高长时序遥感影像预测的稳定性；多玩家界面启发遥感协同标注与仿真的分布式平台设计。但核心工作偏向虚拟世界生成，遥感领域的物理约束和数据特性需额外适配。

title: Face-trace: Open-Set Attribution and Progressive Discovery of Synthetic Face Generators
summary: Recent advances in generative Artificial Intelligence have made synthetic face images increasingly realistic, creating new challenges for multimedia forensics. Source attribution methods should not only identify the generator of an image when the source is known, but also handle samples produced by previously unseen models. However, most existing approaches address synthetic face attribution in a closed-set setting, where all possible generators are available during training. This assumption does not hold in real-world scenarios, where new generators continuously appear and rejected samples should be organized rather than simply discarded. In this work we propose a pipeline for open-set synthetic face source attribution that combines known generator classification, energy-based OOD rejection, and unknown generator discovery. A classifier is trained on known generators using frozen I-JEPA embeddings, while rejected samples are represented by combining projected I-JEPA features with Forensic Self-Descriptors and then clustered to discover groups of unknown generators. We also extend the discovery stage to an incremental scenario, where rejected samples arrive over time. Experiments on the WILD dataset show that the proposed method achieves 96.73% closed-set attribution accuracy. In the open-set setting, energy-based rejection reaches 71.25% balanced accuracy, while rejected samples are clustered into meaningful unknown-generator groups, obtaining an ARI of 0.81, an NMI of 0.90, and an overall clustering purity of 87.74%. In the incremental setting, the discovered generator space is progressively extended while maintaining a final purity of 99.23%. Cross-dataset experiments suggest that the pipeline can operate beyond the original dataset distribution, although post-processing remains challenging.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个面向开放集合成人脸溯源的开集溯源流水线，结合I-JEPA特征、能量基OOD拒绝和未知生成器聚类，在WILD数据集上达到96.73%闭集准确率，开集平衡准确率71.25%，聚类ARI为0.81，增量场景纯度达99.23%。
AI.motivation: 现有合成人脸溯源方法大多假设闭集场景（所有生成器在训练时已知），而现实中新生成器不断涌现，且被拒绝样本不应直接丢弃而应加以组织。因此需要一种能同时处理已知生成器分类、未知生成器拒绝与发现的开集方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用冻结的I-JEPA嵌入训练分类器进行已知生成器分类；2) 基于能量函数进行OOD拒绝（Energy-based OOD rejection）；3) 将投影后的I-JEPA特征与Forensic Self-Descriptors结合，对拒绝样本进行聚类以发现未知生成器群组；4) 将发现阶段扩展到增量场景，逐步处理随时间到达的拒绝样本。
AI.result: WILD数据集上闭集归因准确率96.73%；开集能量拒绝平衡准确率71.25%；拒绝样本聚类ARI为0.81，NMI为0.90，聚类纯度87.74%；增量场景最终纯度99.23%；跨数据集实验表明流水线可推广到原分布之外。
AI.conclusion: 所提开集溯源流水线能有效处理已知生成器分类、未知生成器拒绝与发现，并在增量场景下保持高性能，但后处理仍是挑战。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像来源归因（如传感器型号、处理软件类型）可借鉴该流水线：1) 使用I-JEPA等自监督特征提取遥感图像通用表征；2) 利用能量基OOD拒绝检测未知传感器或处理软件生成的图像；3) 将拒绝样本聚类以发现新的传感器或处理流水线；4) 增量场景适用于遥感数据持续积累的情况。但遥感图像空间分辨率高、光谱维度多，需调整特征提取与聚类策略。

title: AA-ViT: Anatomically Aware Vision Transformer with Structural and Frequency Guidance for Contrast Enhanced Brain MRI Synthesis
comment: Accepted for Publication in MIUA 2026 proceedings
summary: Accurate tumour localization and diagnosis is a critical component of clinical care for brain cancers. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is the most commonly used imaging modality due to its superior soft-tissue contrast. However, standard MRI often exhibits limited contrast and imaging artifacts, which necessitates the use of contrast agents to enhance lesion visibility. The administration of chemical contrast agents is not always feasible and may be contraindicated in patients with renal impairment or other health conditions. As a result, developing accurate and non-invasive contrast enhanced MRI (CEMRI) synthesis methods has clinical importance. In recent years, numerous approaches for CEMRI synthesis have been proposed, predominantly relying on generative artificial intelligence models. While these methods demonstrate promising performance, their dependence on implicit feature learning often limits their ability to preserve anatomical boundaries and tumour-specific fine structures. To address these challenges, we propose an anatomically aware frequency-and-structure-guided vision transformer (AA-ViT), for CEMRI synthesis using pre-contrast MRI modalities (T1, T2, and FLAIR). Experiments on the BraTS 2021 dataset demonstrate that the proposed method preserves anatomical and lesion boundaries, achieving higher PSNR and SSIM than state-of-the-art approaches. Clinical evaluation by three neuroradiologists and a neurosurgeon on 19 randomly selected cases across diverse gliomas yielded a mean score of 3.94/5, providing preliminary clinical validation rarely seen in prior studies. Synthetic post-contrast scans from our model could lower scanning costs, shorten imaging time, and avoid the potential risks of using gadolinium-based contrast agents.

AI.tldr: 提出一种解剖感知的频率与结构引导视觉Transformer (AA-ViT)，用于无需造影剂的增强MRI合成，在BraTS 2021数据集上优于现有方法，并获得了神经放射科医生和神经外科医生的临床验证。
AI.motivation: 标准MRI对比度有限且存在成像伪影，需使用造影剂增强病灶可见性，但造影剂给药并非总是可行，且在肾功能不全等患者中可能禁忌。因此，开发准确、无创的对比增强MRI合成方法具有重要的临床意义。
AI.method: 提出解剖感知的频率与结构引导视觉Transformer (AA-ViT)，利用T1、T2和FLAIR等多模态非增强MRI序列，通过频率域和结构信息的引导，增强解剖边界和肿瘤特异性精细结构的保留能力。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2021数据集上，PSNR和SSIM均优于现有方法。三位神经放射科医生和一位神经外科医生对19例随机选择的胶质瘤病例进行临床评估，平均评分为3.94/5。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可降低扫描成本、缩短成像时间，并避免钆基造影剂的潜在风险，为无创增强MRI合成提供了有效的临床可行方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临无标签/少标签数据下的图像增强问题。该AA-ViT框架的频率与结构引导机制可直接迁移至遥感图像的超分辨率重建或跨模态合成（如SAR到光学），利用频率域保持地物边缘、结构引导保留细粒度纹理。需调整之处：将MRI多模态输入替换为遥感多模态数据（如多光谱、SAR、LiDAR），并将肿瘤病灶检测目标调整为地物分类/变化检测任务。

title: Automatic Echocardiography Segmentation via Transition Probability Correlation for Stable Semantic Extraction
summary: While echocardiography is essential for cardiovascular diagnosis, inherent speckle noise and low signal-to-noise ratio often lead to ambiguous semantic features and fragmented boundaries. These limitations significantly hinder the segmentation accuracy of deep learning models in complex clinical cases. Moreover, temporal motion of the heart plays a critical role in recognizing anatomical structures. To address these challenges, we designed a STLSF module which comprises a window-matching-based semantic correction component and a semantics-guided texture enhancement component. By leveraging local transition probability correlations to correct semantics and employing semantics-guided texture enhancement, the STLSF module effectively mitigates texture instability and ambiguous semantic interpretations caused by disadvantaged echocardiography quality. Additionally, to facilitate the encoder's adaptation to the intrinsic priors of ultrasound-specific imaging patterns, we propose a frequency-aware denoising pre-training method. The entire work builds a convolution-based network with locality inductive bias and long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments confirm our SOTA performance, achieving 93.87\% Dice on CAMUS and 92.62\% on EchoNet-Dynamic, with respective HD95 values of 3.29mm and 2.73mm.

AI.tldr: 针对超声心动图存在的散斑噪声、低信噪比导致的语义模糊和边界碎片化问题，本文提出STLSF模块（含窗口匹配语义校正和语义引导纹理增强）及频率感知去噪预训练方法，构建兼具局部归纳偏置和长程依赖的卷积网络，在CAMUS和EchoNet-Dynamic数据集上取得SOTA性能（Dice分别达93.87%和92.62%）。
AI.motivation: 超声心动图固有的散斑噪声和低信噪比导致深度学习模型在复杂临床病例中分割精度严重下降，表现为语义特征模糊和边界不连续；同时心脏的时间运动信息对解剖结构识别至关重要，但现有方法未能有效利用局部转移概率和语义引导机制来克服这些成像质量问题。
AI.method: 设计了STLSF模块，包含两个核心组件：(1) 基于窗口匹配的语义校正组件，利用局部转移概率相关性修正语义；(2) 语义引导的纹理增强组件，缓解纹理不稳定性和语义歧义。此外提出频率感知去噪预训练方法，使编码器适应超声成像模式的固有先验。整体构建了具有局部归纳偏置和长程依赖的卷积网络。
AI.result: 在CAMUS数据集上Dice达到93.87%，HD95为3.29mm；在EchoNet-Dynamic数据集上Dice达到92.62%，HD95为2.73mm，均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的STLSF模块结合频率感知预训练方法，有效解决了超声心动图中的噪声干扰和语义模糊问题，实现了高质量的心脏结构分割，在两项公开基准上均取得最优结果。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像同样面临斑点噪声（如SAR图像）和低信噪比导致的边界模糊问题。具体交叉方案：(1) STLSF模块的窗口匹配语义校正可直接迁移至遥感图像分割，利用地物局部转移概率（如城区→道路→植被的过渡模式）修正语义；(2) 语义引导纹理增强可应用于高分辨率遥感影像中同物异谱/异物同谱问题的缓解；(3) 频率感知去噪预训练方法可适配SAR图像的相干斑噪声特性，帮助编码器学习遥感成像的频域先验。需注意将心腔运动的时间建模替换为多尺度/多视角的空间上下文建模。

title: Cardiac MRI Through-Plane Super-Resolution Guided by Reference and Memory
summary: Clinical cardiac MRI is commonly acquired with high in-plane resolution but coarse through-plane resolution to reduce scan time and accommodate breath-hold and cardiac-motion constraints, which limits 3D analysis and diagnostic accuracy. We propose STRMSR, a reference- and memory-guided through-plane super-resolution (SR) framework that reconstructs high-resolution (HR) cardiac volumes by leveraging HR reference views acquired from the same subject and intermediate SR results as the memory. Our method uses coarse-to-fine contextual matching to establish robust correspondence between low-resolution target and reference/memory images under spatial misalignment. A learnable patch-wise dynamic feature aggregation module predicts content-adaptive mixture weights for each local patch, effectively fusing dynamic information while suppressing unreliable feature transfers. The intermediate SR results stored in the memory bank ensure slice-to-slice consistency for the super-resolved 3D volume. Experiments on the WHS cardiac MRI dataset under two reference protocols, orthogonal-plane views and long-axis chamber views, demonstrate consistent improvements over baselines at 4x and 8x upsampling factors.

AI.tldr: STRMSR是一种参考与记忆引导的MRI超分辨率框架，通过利用同一受试者的高分辨率参考视图和中间超分辨率结果作为记忆，采用粗到细上下文匹配与可学习动态特征融合模块，在4倍和8倍上采样下显著提升了心脏三维体积重建质量。
AI.motivation: 临床心脏MRI通常采用高面内分辨率但粗穿透平面分辨率的采集方式，以缩短扫描时间并满足屏气和心脏运动约束，但这限制了三维分析和诊断准确性。现有方法缺乏利用同一受试者高分辨率参考信息进行穿透平面超分辨率重建的有效方案。
AI.method: 提出STRMSR框架，包含三个关键组件：(1) 粗到细上下文匹配模块，建立低分辨率目标与参考/记忆图像间的鲁棒对应关系以应对空间未对齐；(2) 可学习的逐块动态特征聚合模块，为每个局部块预测内容自适应混合权重，融合动态信息并抑制不可靠特征传输；(3) 记忆库存储中间超分辨率结果，确保超分辨三维体积的切片间一致性。
AI.result: 在WHS心脏MRI数据集上，采用正交平面视图和长轴室视图两种参考协议，在4倍和8倍上采样因子下均取得优于基线的稳定改进。
AI.conclusion: STRMSR有效利用参考视图和中间记忆实现了高质量的心脏MRI穿透平面超分辨率重建，为三维心脏分析提供了更优的数据基础。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架可直接迁移至遥感多模态/多分辨率图像超分辨率重建任务：(1) 将高分辨率参考视图替换为同一区域的高分辨率遥感影像（如全色影像），对低分辨率多光谱影像进行超分辨率重建；(2) 粗到细上下文匹配可有效处理遥感影像中常见的几何畸变与配准误差；(3) 记忆库机制可推广到遥感时序影像序列，利用已重建的高分辨率中间结果保证时序一致性；(4) 动态特征聚合模块可自适应融合不同源遥感数据中的互补信息，抑制云雾遮挡等不可靠区域的特征。

title: MedPMC: A Systematic Framework for Scaling High-Fidelity Medical Multimodal Data for Foundation Models
summary: Medicine is inherently multimodal, requiring clinicians to synthesize information across diverse data streams. Yet the development of multimodal foundation models is constrained by limited access to large-scale, high-quality clinical data. Although PubMed Central (PMC) offers a complementary source of expert-authored image-text data, existing PMC-derived resources remain limited in fidelity, reproducibility, and clinical validation. We introduce MedPMC, an automated, continuously updatable framework that transforms permissively licensed literature into high-fidelity infrastructure for medical multimodal models. Applied to 6.1 million PMC articles, MedPMC curated 11 million medical image-text pairs. Component evaluations showed strong performance for initial screening (F1 = 93.2), multi-panel figure detection (F1 = 96.5), figure separation (mAP = 89.8), caption separation and alignment (F1 = 81.4; ROUGE-L = 85.3), and medical figure classification (F1 = 96.5). Manual review by five annotators, three with medical training, found 95.3% of MedPMC images medically relevant, versus 19.7% in a prior PMC-derived dataset. Across 26 benchmarks spanning 11 specialties, a MedPMC-trained CLIP-style model improved average zero-shot AUC by 7.1 percentage points over the strongest architecture-matched biomedical CLIP baseline despite using fewer than half as many image-text pairs. As the vision encoder in a multimodal large language model, it improved medical visual question-answering by 1.9 and 16.9 percentage points across two benchmarks. In 10,524 Yale New Haven Health System dermatology photographs, it improved morphology-to-image retrieval Recall@5 by 11.7 percentage points. These findings show that high-fidelity literature curation strengthens medical multimodal foundation models across benchmark and clinical settings. We publicly release the framework, corpus, benchmarks, and pretrained models.

AI.tldr: MedPMC是一个自动化、可持续更新的框架，将PMC文献转化为高质量医学多模态数据集。基于610万篇文章构建了1100万图像-文本对，训练的CLIP-style模型在26个基准测试中平均零样本AUC提升7.1个百分点，并在临床照片检索任务中Recall@5提升11.7个百分点。
AI.motivation: 医学本质上是多模态的，但大规模高质量临床数据的获取受限。现有PMC衍生数据集在保真度、可重复性和临床验证方面存在不足，亟需高保真的医学多模态基础模型基础设施。
AI.method: MedPMC框架包含：初始筛选（F1=93.2）、多面板图形检测（F1=96.5）、图形分割（mAP=89.8）、图注分离与对齐（F1=81.4; ROUGE-L=85.3）和医学图形分类（F1=96.5）等组件，自动处理PMC文章生成高保真图像-文本对。
AI.result: MedPMC图像医学相关率为95.3%（此前PMC数据集仅19.7%）。训练的CLIP模型在26个基准中零样本AUC提升7.1个百分点；作为MLLM视觉编码器，VQA提升1.9和16.9个百分点；临床照片检索Recall@5提升11.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 高保真文献策展能有效增强医学多模态基础模型在基准测试和临床场景中的表现。项目框架、数据集、基准和预训练模型均已公开。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临多模态数据（光学影像、SAR、高光谱、文本描述）质量参差的问题。可借鉴MedPMC的自动化处理管线：1）多面板遥感图像检测与分割；2）图注与遥感图像的对齐策略；3）领域专家验证的质量控制流程。该框架可应用于遥感文献（如IEEE TGRS、RS）构建高质量遥感图像-文本对，提升遥感CLIP和遥感多模态大模型的基础能力。

title: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence
summary: Despite the recent promise in robot control, video generative models suffer from a domain mismatch due to their primary focus on content creation. For example, their design inherently prioritizes visual fidelity and creativity over computational efficiency and physical realism. In this work, we present LingBot-Video, a DiT-based video pretraining paradigm specifically tailored for embodied intelligence. From the architecture perspective, we adopt the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), instead of dense, framework to achieve a better trade-off between modeling capacity and inference efficiency, and manage to scale it up from scratch. From the data perspective, we construct a data profiling engine that augments standard internet videos with extensive robot-oriented footage, encompassing manipulation, navigation, and egocentric perspectives, to equip the base model with an intrinsic understanding of actions and world dynamics. From the training perspective, we develop a multi-dimensional reward system to enforce the alignment regarding physical rationality and task completion, going beyond standard criteria such as aesthetics, prompt-following, and motion consistency. Comprehensive evaluations validate its performance and efficiency as a video foundation model. We contribute LingBot-Video as the inaugural large-scale, open-source MoE video foundation model to the community, in a pioneering effort to bridge digital creativity and physical actuation.

AI.tldr: LingBot-Video是一个基于DiT的MoE视频预训练范式，专门为具身智能设计，通过架构（MoE）、数据（机器人视角数据增强）和训练（多维奖励系统）三方面的创新，弥合数字内容创作与物理执行之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型专注于内容创作，优先考虑视觉保真度和创造性，而非计算效率和物理真实性，导致在机器人控制领域存在领域不匹配问题。
AI.method: 1) 架构上采用MoE代替密集框架，实现建模能力与推理效率的更好权衡；2) 数据上构建数据配置引擎，用大量机器人视角数据（操作、导航、第一人称）增强标准互联网视频；3) 训练上开发多维奖励系统，强制对齐物理合理性和任务完成度，超越传统美学、指令遵循和运动一致性标准。
AI.result: 综合评估验证了其作为视频基础模型的性能和效率，并作为首个大规模开源MoE视频基础模型发布。
AI.conclusion: LingBot-Video作为首个大规模开源MoE视频基础模型，在连接数字创意与物理执行方面做出了开创性努力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1) 遥感视频预测与具身智能具有相似的物理世界理解需求，LingBot-Video的MoE架构可直接用于遥感视频模型，降低计算开销；2) 多维奖励系统中的物理合理性约束可迁移至遥感时序分析（如地表变化检测、灾害演化预测）；3) 机器人操作/导航数据增强策略可类比为遥感中的地物变化序列增强；4) 改进方向：需针对遥感影像的多光谱/高光谱特性调整DiT的tokenization方式。

title: PoseIDON: 6DoF pose estimation with foundation model features for marine sediment burial mapping
summary: The burial state of anthropogenic objects on the seafloor provides insight into localized sedimentation dynamics and is also critical for assessing ecological risks, potential pollutant transport, and the viability of recovery or mitigation strategies for hazardous materials such as munitions. Accurate burial depth estimation from remote imagery remains difficult due to partial occlusion, poor visibility, and object degradation. This work introduces a computer vision pipeline, called PoseIDON, which combines deep foundation model features with multiview photogrammetry to estimate six degrees of freedom object pose and the orientation of the surrounding seafloor from ROV video. Burial depth is inferred by aligning CAD models of the objects with observed imagery and fitting a local planar approximation of the seafloor. The method is validated using footage of 54 objects, including barrels and munitions, recorded at a historic ocean dumpsite in the San Pedro Basin. The model achieves a mean burial depth error of approximately 10 cm and resolves spatial burial patterns that reflect underlying sediment transport processes. This approach enables scalable, non-invasive mapping of seafloor burial and supports environmental assessment at contaminated sites.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PoseIDON的计算机视觉管线，结合深度基础模型特征与多视图摄影测量，从ROV视频中估计物体的六自由度位姿和海底朝向，通过CAD模型对齐推断掩埋深度。在54个物体（桶和弹药）上验证，平均掩埋深度误差约10 cm，可实现可扩展、非侵入式的海底掩埋制图。
AI.motivation: 海底人造物体的掩埋状态对评估生态风险、污染物迁移以及危险材料（如弹药）的回收或缓解策略至关重要，但现有遥感影像方法因部分遮挡、能见度差和物体退化而难以准确估计掩埋深度。
AI.method: 构建PoseIDON管线：(1) 利用深度基础模型特征与多视图摄影测量，从ROV视频中估计物体的六自由度位姿及周围海底朝向；(2) 将物体CAD模型与观测影像对齐；(3) 拟合海底局部平面近似，通过模型与平面的相对位置推断掩埋深度。
AI.result: 在圣佩德罗盆地历史海洋倾倒场的54个物体（包括桶和弹药）上验证，平均掩埋深度误差约10 cm，能解析反映底层沉积物输运过程的空间掩埋模式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了可扩展、非侵入式的海底掩埋制图，支持受污染场地的环境评估。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该方法的视觉SLAM/多视图几何框架可直接迁移至遥感领域：(1) 在浅水区结合多光谱/高光谱遥感影像与海底地形模型，构建三维海底场景并估计水下目标掩埋状态；(2) 将深度基础模型特征引入卫星遥感影像的建筑物/沉船检测与位姿估计，克服云层遮挡和阴影问题；(3) 利用LiDAR点云代替ROV视频中的多视图图像，通过CAD模型对齐实现陆上或浅海区物体的掩埋/覆盖深度自动化测量。核心改进点在于融合多源遥感数据（声学、光学、激光）以增强复杂环境下的鲁棒性。

title: SPPSFormer: High-Quality Superpoint-Based Transformer for Roof Plane Instance Segmentation from Point Clouds
summary: Superpoint Transformers use superpoints as the basic processing units, thereby significantly reducing the number of tokens processed by Transformers. However, they have been seldom employed in point cloud roof plane instance segmentation, and existing superpoint Transformers suffer from limited performance due to the use of low-quality superpoints. To address this challenge, we establish a set of criteria that high-quality superpoints for Transformers should satisfy and introduce a corresponding two-stage superpoint generation process. The superpoints generated by our method not only have accurate boundaries, but also exhibit consistent geometric sizes and shapes, which greatly benefit the feature learning of superpoint Transformers. To compensate for the limitations of deep learning features when the training set size is limited, we incorporate multidimensional handcrafted features into the model. Additionally, we design a decoder that combines a Kolmogorov–Arnold Network with a Transformer module to improve instance prediction and mask extraction. Finally, our network’s predictions are refined using traditional algorithm-based post-processing. For evaluation, we annotated a real-world dataset and corrected annotation errors in the existing RoofN3D dataset. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on our dataset, as well as both the original and corrected RoofN3D datasets. Our model also shows significant advantages over existing methods when handling data with low point density, large density variations, or low 3D point precision. Moreover, it is not sensitive to plane boundary annotations during training, significantly reducing the annotation burden. We will release our code, trained models, and datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高质量超点生成、多维度手工特征融合、KAN-Transformer解码器及后处理的点云屋顶平面实例分割方法，在多个数据集上达到SOTA，且对低密度、大密度变化、低精度数据具有鲁棒性，降低了对边界标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有超点Transformer在点云屋顶平面实例分割中应用较少，且因使用低质量超点导致性能受限。为此，本文旨在建立高质量超点的标准并设计相应的生成流程，以提升分割性能。
AI.method: 1) 提出高质量超点应满足的准则，并设计两阶段超点生成流程，超点具有精确边界和一致的几何尺寸与形状；2) 融合多维度手工特征以弥补训练集有限时深度学习特征的不足；3) 设计KAN-Transformer组合解码器提升实例预测和掩码提取；4) 采用传统算法后处理进行精细化优化。
AI.result: 在自标注数据集、原始及修正后的RoofN3D数据集上均达到SOTA；在低点密度、大密度变化、低3D点精度场景下优势明显；对训练时的平面边界标注不敏感，降低了标注负担。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过高质量超点生成与多特征融合，显著提升了超点Transformer在屋顶平面分割中的性能，具有强鲁棒性和低标注成本优势。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该工作本身就是遥感建筑屋顶分割方向的论文。改进方案：1) 可将超点生成准则推广至遥感大场景LiDAR点云（如城区建筑物、植被、地面分割），采用多尺度超点融合策略；2) KAN-Transformer解码器可替换为遥感中更高效的分组注意力机制以应对大规模数据；3) 手工特征可引入遥感专属特征如NDVI、高程标准差、纹理特征等；4) 后处理可引入基于图割或CRF的全局优化，进一步提升建筑物边界精度。

title: Drainage Duration Variability and PALSAR-2 Sensitivity to Rice-Field Water Status: Insights from Large-Scale In Situ Water-Level Observations
summary: Achieving scalable monitoring of Alternate Wetting and Drying (AWD) for methane mitigation in rice cultivation depends on establishing field benchmarks for drainage behavior and demonstrating that satellite observations can reliably detect corresponding changes in water status. We analyzed about two million high-frequency in situ water-level observations from hundreds of sensors deployed in rice fields across the Philippines and Japan to quantify drainage duration from near-surface conditions to 15 cm below the soil surface and to test the sensitivity of open-access PALSAR-2 dual-polarization L-band SAR to vertical water-level variations. Across 564 drainage events, the median drainage duration was 19.0 h, and only 0.9% of events exceeded 240 h, indicating that drainage happens generally within a day. Seasonal differences were evident in Pangasinan, while small Chiba and Cagayan samples suggested exploratory longer-duration patterns; multiple drainage events occurred in 48.0% of Philippine dry-season fields but only 21.6% of wet-season fields. PALSAR-2 data showed a statistical significance in detecting inundation at Mid crop growth stage with cross-polarization band, but the significant overlap induces challenges in operational applications. These results provide empirical benchmarks for AWD-related drainage dynamics while showing that dual-polarization PALSAR-2 alone is unlikely to support robust field-scale monitoring of rice-field water status.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了菲律宾和日本稻田约200万个高频率水位观测数据，量化了AWD排水动态（中位排水时长19小时，仅0.9%事件超过240小时），并检验了PALSAR-2双极化L-SAR对水位变化的敏感性。结果表明交叉极化可检测中期生长阶段的水淹状态，但显著重叠限制了实际应用，双极化PALSAR-2难以支撑稳健的田间尺度水稻水情监测。
AI.motivation: 实现稻田交替干湿灌溉（AWD）的甲烷减排可扩展监测需要建立排水行为的田间基准，并验证卫星遥感能否可靠检测相应的水情变化。
AI.method: 利用菲律宾和日本数百个传感器采集的约200万个高频原位水位观测数据，量化从近地表到土壤表层以下15厘米的排水时长，并测试PALSAR-2双极化L-SAR对垂直水位变化的敏感性。
AI.result: 564次排水事件中位排水时长为19.0小时，仅0.9%超过240小时；菲律宾旱季48.0%的田地出现多次排水事件，雨季仅21.6%；PALSAR-2交叉极化在中期生长阶段对水淹检测具有统计显著性，但信号重叠显著。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了AWD排水动态的经验基准，但双极化PALSAR-2单独难以支持可靠的大尺度稻田水情监测。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。针对AWD监测的遥感瓶颈，可考虑以下改进方向：（1）融合多源SAR数据（如Sentinel-1 C波段与PALSAR-2 L波段），利用不同波段的穿透能力差异提升水层深度反演精度；（2）引入光学遥感（如Sentinel-2）辅助识别植被覆盖度和土壤湿度，弥补SAR在水稻生长中后期信号重叠的限制；（3）结合深度学习时序模型（如LSTM或Transformer）对多模态遥感时序与水位观测数据进行联合建模，提升排水事件的检测鲁棒性；（4）利用InSAR相干性或极化分解技术提取稻田微地形变化与水分状态信息，增强信号区分度。

title: An Interpretable Multi-Source Data Integration Framework for Prior-Guided Decametric-Resolution LAI Estimation
summary: Decametric-resolution leaf area index (LAI) is an essential parameter for fine-scale crop growth monitoring and ecosystem modeling. Prior-guided approaches using existing hectometric-resolution LAI products have demonstrated potential in large-scale decametric-resolution LAI estimation. However, within such approaches, the impacts of algorithm selection and band combination on retrieval accuracy remain insufficiently quantified, and the lack of model interpretability limits methodological transferability. To address these challenges, a multi-source data integration (MSDI) framework is developed to systematically assess the sensitivity of prior-guided LAI estimation to retrieval algorithms and spectral bands using Sentinel-2 imagery. In addition, Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) is employed to quantify the contributions of individual bands and interpret model behavior. The MSDI LAI was evaluated using ground LAI measurements and compared with Simplified Level 2 Product Prototype Processor (SL2P)-derived LAI and MODIS LAI products. The results indicated that Support Vector Regression (SVR) achieved the best performance in LAI estimation among six machine learning algorithms, likely due to its robustness in modeling nonlinear relationships across different training samples. Band optimization further reduced estimation uncertainty by >24% and increased R2 by >44% for SVR-derived LAI estimates. Moreover, MSDI outperformed SL2P, especially at 20 m resolution, with Bias, RMSE, and R2 values of 0.26, 0.76, and 0.71, respectively. Meanwhile, MSDI LAI exhibited a similar spatial distribution to MODIS LAI while providing substantially enhanced spatial detail and accuracy. SHAP analysis revealed that red-edge (RE) and shortwave-infrared (SWIR) bands contributed the most to LAI prediction, consistent with their sensitivity to vegetation canopy biophysical properties. Overall, this study highlights the importance of retrieval strategy optimization and model interpretability for improving prior-guided decametric-resolution LAI estimation and offers practical guidance for generating consistent LAI estimations across various scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多源数据集成（MSDI）框架，系统评估了先验引导的十米分辨率LAI估算中算法选择和波段组合的影响，并利用SHAP增强模型可解释性。实验表明SVR表现最优，波段优化使不确定性降低>24%、R²提升>44%，MSDI在20米分辨率下优于SL2P（Bias=0.26，RMSE=0.76，R²=0.71），红边和短波红外波段贡献最大。
AI.motivation: 现有先验引导的十米分辨率LAI估算方法中，算法选择和波段组合对反演精度的影响尚未被充分量化，且模型缺乏可解释性限制了方法迁移性。
AI.method: 构建多源数据集成（MSDI）框架，集成六种机器学习算法（如SVR），结合Sentinel-2影像进行波段优化，并引入SHAP分析各波段贡献及模型行为。
AI.result: SVR在六种算法中表现最佳；波段优化使SVR的LAI估算不确定性降低>24%，R²提升>44%；MSDI在20米分辨率下优于SL2P（Bias=0.26，RMSE=0.76，R²=0.71）；MSDI LAI与MODIS LAI空间分布一致但细节更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 优化反演策略和增强模型可解释性对改进先验引导的十米分辨率LAI估算至关重要，为跨尺度生成一致的LAI估算提供了实践指导。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感领域论文，改进方案：（1）可引入深度学习模型（如CNN或Transformer）替代传统机器学习，以更好捕捉空间上下文信息；（2）可结合多时相信息进行时间序列LAI动态监测；（3）考虑地形校正，提升山地等复杂地形的LAI反演精度；（4）可将SHAP分析扩展到多源数据融合（如Sentinel-1 SAR与光学数据）以提升云覆盖区域的LAI估算可靠性。

title: A Stability-Driven Framework for Automated Operational Crop Mapping Using Optical and Radar Satellite Image Time Series
summary: Operational crop mapping requires classifiers capable of robust generalization across years. While feature importance is routinely used for model optimization, its temporal stability has rarely been systematically investigated, creating a critical gap in deploying reliable monitoring systems. This study moves beyond identifying “most important” features to systematically evaluate and quantify their inter-annual stability for enabling automated classification. Using six agricultural years (2018, 2019, 2020, 2023, 2024 and 2025) of Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 data over Morocco, we extracted 156 multi-sensor features across 12 monthly composites and analyzed their importance stability through statistical metrics, clustering, and novel composite indices: the Reliability Index (RI) and Automatic Selection Score (AuSS). This framework automates feature selection by ranking features with RI and AuSS and then applying Pareto optimization to identify a minimal stable feature set—without requiring annual retraining or expert intervention. Our analysis confirms a fundamental tension: the most discriminative features (e.g., NDVI, VH, VV) are also the most volatile, while stable features (e.g., NDRE, MSI, NDMI) offer modest predictive power. Hierarchical clustering revealed four behavioral typologies (Dominant Stable, Performant Volatile, Stable Minor, and Noise), guiding strategic feature management. Crucially, a Pareto analysis demonstrated that a refined portfolio of 6 indices (VH, VV, NDVI, NDRE, GCVI, RVI) captures 57.2% of cumulative predictive importance, filtering out inter-annual noise while preserving discriminative signal. The Voting Ensemble leveraging this Stable Portfolio maintained consistent high accuracy (87.4% accuracy, 87.2% F1-score) with minimal performance degradation during temporal transfer, while models based on volatile top features exhibited significant drops. Entropy analysis confirmed that all features in the Stable Portfolio provide consistent informational certainty, indicating that stability-driven selection does not increase model uncertainty. We conclude that feature stability is not merely a diagnostic metric but a foundational criterion for operational design. We propose a practical, metrics-driven framework for constructing automated crop classification systems that are more resilient to inter-annual climate variability.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了作物分类中特征重要性的年际稳定性，提出可靠性指数(RI)和自动选择分数(AuSS)等指标，通过帕累托优化筛选出由6个指数(VH, VV, NDVI, NDRE, GCVI, RVI)组成的稳定特征集，该集合捕获57.2%的累积预测重要性，集成模型在时间迁移中保持87.4%准确率，证明了特征稳定性是自动化作物监测系统的关键设计准则。
AI.motivation: 尽管特征重要性常被用于模型优化，但其年际稳定性极少被系统研究，这阻碍了可靠作物监测系统的部署。现有研究多聚焦于识别“最重要的”特征，却忽略了这些特征在跨年份分类中的波动性，导致模型在实际应用中性能退化。
AI.method: 基于摩洛哥6个农业年度(2018-2025)的Sentinel-1/2数据提取156个多传感器特征，通过统计指标、聚类分析和两个新型复合指数(可靠性指数RI、自动选择分数AuSS)评估特征稳定性，并采用帕累托优化从候选特征中筛选最小稳定特征集。
AI.result: 最具判别力的特征(NDVI、VH、VV)也最不稳定，而稳定特征(NDRE、MSI、NDMI)预测能力较弱。层次聚类揭示四种行为类型(稳定主导、易变高性能、稳定次要、噪声)。帕累托分析确定的6个稳定指标(VH, VV, NDVI, NDRE, GCVI, RVI)捕获57.2%的累积预测重要性，集成模型在时间迁移中保持87.4%准确率和87.2% F1分数，而基于不稳定特征的模型性能显著下降。熵分析表明稳定特征集不增加模型不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 特征稳定性不仅是诊断指标，更是自动化作物分类系统设计的基础性准则。提出的基于指标的框架可构建对年际气候变异更具鲁棒性的自动化分类系统，无需年度重训练或专家干预。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。核心创新在于将特征稳定性作为系统性评估标准，可直接应用于遥感领域的作物分类、土地覆盖制图等任务。改进方向：(1)可将该稳定性评估框架扩展到更多遥感应用(如森林监测、灾害评估)；(2)可引入更多传感器(如雷达、高光谱)的特征进行稳定性分析；(3)可探索深度学习特征(如自注意力权重)的稳定性；(4)该方法可扩展到全球不同农业生态区的跨区域验证。

title: Bloom or Bluff? Benchmarking Vision–Language Models Against Classical Machine Learning for Harmful Algal Bloom Detection from Satellite Imagery
summary: In recent years, there has been growing interest in applying vision–language models (VLMs) to quantitative remote sensing. This study evaluates whether three commercial VLMs (GPT-4o, GPT-5.5, and Claude Sonnet 4.6) can detect and classify the severity of harmful algal blooms (HABs) from Sentinel-2 satellite imagery of western Lake Erie and compares them against classical machine learning classifiers (Random Forest (RF), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost)) trained on both a three-band red, green, blue (RGB) composite representation of the imagery and a 10-band multi-spectral reflectance representation. Forty bloom events identified from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) Harmful Algal Bloom Operational Forecast System (HAB-OFS) severity assessments were assembled into the evaluation dataset, spanning seven bloom seasons (2019–2025). For binary bloom detection, the VLMs did not match the classical RGB classifiers; their F1 scores (0.69–0.75) fell below the best RGB classifier (Random Forest, 0.76) and below a trivial always-present baseline (F1 = 0.77), and they carried false positive rates of 73–93% on bloom-absent images, against 27–40% for the RGB classifiers. The VLMs reached high recall by labeling most scenes as bloom-positive, which makes them operationally unreliable in this configuration. For severity classification, the VLMs assigned 60–70% of their predictions to the “moderate” category regardless of actual conditions and identified at most one of the two severe blooms, whereas the classical classifiers tracked the ground-truth distribution and delivered two to nearly three times the exact-match accuracy (0.44–0.59 vs. 0.20–0.225). The strongest method across all metrics was the multi-spectral SVM (F1 = 0.833, false positive rate 27%, accuracy 0.795). Switching the same SVM from RGB to multi-spectral features raised accuracy from 0.675 to 0.795, a 12-percentage-point gain that measures the spectral information carried by red-edge and shortwave infrared bands that are accessible through multi-spectral sensors but unavailable to standard VLM vision encoders. Feature-importance analysis showed that the multi-spectral classifiers ranked chlorophyll-specific indices, the Normalized Difference Chlorophyll Index (NDCI) and the Floating Algae Index (FAI), among their top predictors, the same signatures used in established operational algorithms, while the RGB classifiers relied on red-channel variability and green-dominant pixel fractions because RGB inputs cannot compute those indices. Two compounded limitations therefore constrain off-the-shelf VLMs for aquatic remote sensing: the limited spectral information available through standard RGB channels and a mismatch between the land-dominated training distributions of these models and aquatic optical conditions. Domain-specific classifiers operating on multi-spectral data remain the more suitable tools for continued development of HAB monitoring and water-quality retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了三种商业视觉语言模型（GPT-4o、GPT-5.5、Claude Sonnet 4.6）与经典机器学习分类器（RF、SVM、XGBoost）在基于Sentinel-2影像检测和分类伊利湖西部有害藻华（HABs）方面的表现。结果表明，VLMs在二值藻华检测中F1分数（0.69-0.75）低于随机森林（0.76）和始终存在的基线（0.77），假阳性率高达73-93%；严重程度分类中VLMs倾向于预测"中等"类别，精确匹配准确率仅为0.20-0.225，远低于经典分类器（0.44-0.59）。多光谱SVM表现最佳（F1=0.833，准确率0.795），特征重要性分析显示多光谱分类器依赖叶绿素特异性指数（NDCI、FAI），而RGB分类器仅能利用红通道变异和绿色主导像素分数。两个主要限制制约了现成VLMs在水体遥感中的应用：标准RGB通道的有限光谱信息，以及模型训练数据以陆地为主与水体光学条件的不匹配。
AI.motivation: 近年来视觉语言模型（VLMs）在定量遥感中的应用兴趣日益增长，但其在有害藻华（HABs）监测中的实际效果尚未得到系统评估。本研究旨在比较商业VLMs与经典机器学习方法在基于卫星影像的藻华检测与严重程度分类中的性能，以验证VLMs是否能够替代或超越传统方法。
AI.method: 收集了2019-2025年七个藻华季节中40个由NOAA HAB-OFS评估识别的藻华事件，构建评估数据集。使用三种商业VLMs（GPT-4o、GPT-5.5、Claude Sonnet 4.6）和三种经典机器学习分类器（RF、SVM、XGBoost）。经典分类器分别在RGB三波段合成图像和10波段多光谱反射率表示上训练。对比分析二值藻华检测和四类严重程度分类的性能，并进行特征重要性分析。
AI.result: VLMs在二值检测中F1分数（0.69-0.75）低于随机森林（0.76）和始终存在的基线（0.77），假阳性率高达73-93%（RGB分类器为27-40%）。严重程度分类中VLMs将60-70%预测归为"中等"类别，精确匹配准确率仅0.20-0.225，远低于经典分类器的0.44-0.59。多光谱SVM表现最佳（F1=0.833，假阳性率27%，准确率0.795）。从RGB切换为多光谱特征使SVM准确率从0.675提升至0.795（提升12个百分点）。多光谱分类器将NDCI和FAI列为重要预测因子，而RGB分类器仅依赖红通道变异和绿色主导像素分数。
AI.conclusion: 现成的商业VLMs在有害藻华监测中存在两个关键限制：标准RGB通道提供的有限光谱信息，以及模型训练数据以陆地为主导致与水体光学条件不匹配。在目前配置下，VLMs在操作上不可靠。基于多光谱数据的领域专用分类器仍是HAB监测和水质反演更合适的工具。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文本身即为遥感应用研究，可从以下方面改进：（1）引入多光谱微调：对VLMs进行多光谱波段（如红边、短波红外）的适配微调，而非仅使用RGB输入，以利用更丰富的光谱信息。（2）水体专用预训练：构建以水体场景为主的预训练数据集，减少陆地分布偏差，提升VLMs在水体光学条件下的表现。（3）混合模型架构：将VLMs的语义理解能力与多光谱分类器的光谱分析能力结合，例如使用VLM提取高层语义特征，再输入SVM/RF进行最终分类。（4）可解释性增强：利用VLMs的语言生成能力，结合特征重要性分析（如NDCI、FAI），输出可解释的藻华诊断报告。

title: Spatiotemporal Dynamics of Dongting Lake During the Flood Season Using Long Time Series SAR Imagery on Google Earth Engine
summary: Flood-season lake spatiotemporal dynamics are vital for ecological security and socioeconomic development, requiring consistent high-resolution monitoring. However, precipitation fluctuations and sediment turbidity significantly alter water quality, while blurred boundaries between water and floodplain wetlands challenge precise monitoring. To address these issues, this study proposes a water body extraction method leveraging polarimetric Synthetic Aperture Radar data. utilizes the maximum between-class variance algorithm for initial segmentation, optimizes the threshold via a genetic algorithm, and employs dynamic morphological operations to refine boundary details. The method was validated using 2015–2025 Sentinel-1 flood-season time series of Dongting Lake on Google Earth Engine. The results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves stable and accurate water extraction across various years and seasons, with an overall accuracy surpassing 0.93, confirming its robustness and broad applicability. Furthermore, the spatiotemporal hydrodynamics and driving mechanisms of Dongting Lake were analyzed by integrating the extracted water areas with multi-source data, including water level, precipitation, discharge, temperature, and sunshine duration. Findings indicate that the flood-season water area exhibited a fluctuating trend, initially increasing and subsequently decreasing, peaking at 2202.26 km2 in 2020 and dropping to 614.04 km2 in 2025, a pattern primarily driven by extreme meteorological events such as heavy rainfall and prolonged droughts. Spatially, inundation patterns were characterized by deeper water in the north and shallower depths in the south, separated by a topographically higher central region. Regression analysis revealed a robust correlation between water area and water level with an R2 of 0.931, providing a quantitative reference for water level estimation in ungauged regions. Additionally, discharge and precipitation were positively correlated with water area, whereas temperature and sunshine duration exerted a negligible influence. This study supports flood regulation in the Dongting Lake basin and provides a robust framework for analyzing lake dynamics using long-term SAR data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于极化SAR数据的洪水期水体提取方法，结合最大类间方差算法、遗传算法阈值优化和动态形态学操作，在2015-2025年洞庭湖Sentinel-1时间序列上验证，总体精度超过0.93。通过整合多源数据分析了洞庭湖洪水期水面积时空动态及驱动机制，发现水面积先增后减（2020年峰值2202.26 km²，2025年降至614.04 km²），主要受极端气象事件驱动，水面积与水位R²达0.931。
AI.motivation: 洪水期湖泊时空动态对生态安全和社会经济发展至关重要，需要一致的高分辨率监测。然而，降水波动和泥沙浊度显著改变水质，水体和洪泛区湿地之间的模糊边界给精确监测带来挑战。
AI.method: 利用极化合成孔径雷达数据，采用最大类间方差算法进行初始分割，通过遗传算法优化阈值，并采用动态形态学操作细化边界细节。在Google Earth Engine上使用2015-2025年洞庭湖Sentinel-1洪水期时间序列进行验证。整合水面积、水位、降水、流量、温度和日照时长等多源数据进行驱动机制分析。
AI.result: 该方法在不同年份和季节均实现了稳定准确的水体提取，总体精度超过0.93。洪水期水面积呈先增后减的波动趋势，2020年峰值2202.26 km²，2025年降至614.04 km²。空间上呈现北深南浅的淹没格局，中央区域地形较高。水面积与水位R²为0.931，流量和降水与水面积正相关，温度和日照时长影响可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 本研究支持洞庭湖流域的洪水调节，为利用长时序SAR数据分析湖泊动态提供了稳健框架。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：（1）可进一步引入深度学习语义分割模型（如U-Net或DeepLabV3+）替代最大类间方差+遗传算法的组合，以提升在复杂边界场景下的分割精度；（2）可考虑加入多极化特征（如全极化分解参数）增强对浑浊水体与洪泛区湿地的区分能力；（3）可将该方法扩展到其他大型湖泊（如鄱阳湖、青海湖）或水库监测，验证其泛化能力；（4）可结合高分辨率光学影像（如Sentinel-2）进行交叉验证，弥补SAR在部分场景下的局限性。

title: Robust Space-Object Association and Recursive Estimation for Ground-Based Optical Observation Under Degraded Orbital Priors and Site-Position Uncertainty
summary: Ground-based optical observation is a key sensing modality for space-object monitoring, but reliable association becomes challenging when orbital priors are degraded, site-position information is imprecise, and each frame contains multiple point-source candidates. This paper proposes a robust framework for single-target association among multiple image candidates and recursive estimation under such conditions. The method first converts image-domain candidates into unit line-of-sight (LOS) directions and represents their local deviations in a prediction-aligned tangent plane. Angular measurement noise and site-position uncertainty are then propagated into the local covariance model. Based on this representation, a kinematic-photometric five-dimensional (5D) normalized innovation squared (NIS) gating statistic is constructed by jointly evaluating local position, pseudo-velocity, and photometric consistency. After association, a three-dimensional decoupled Kalman update is performed using only the single-frame position and photometric measurements. Experiments on four real ground-based optical satellite observation sequences, including two static scenarios and two dynamic scenarios, show correct association rates of 100.00%, 100.00%, 100.00%, and 85.86%, respectively. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework improves association reliability under degraded orbital priors and imprecise site-position information while maintaining stable recursive estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在退化轨道先验、不精确站点位置信息以及多候选点条件下，基于单目标关联与递推估计的鲁棒框架。方法将图像域候选点转换为单位视线方向，构建预测对齐切平面上的局部协方差模型，并利用运动-光度五维归一化新息平方统计量实现关联，随后进行三维解耦卡尔曼更新。在四组真实光学卫星观测序列上取得100%、100%、100%和85.86%的正确关联率。
AI.motivation: 地面光学观测是空间目标监测的关键手段，但在轨道先验退化、站点位置信息不精确且每帧存在多个点源候选点时，可靠关联极具挑战。现有方法难以同时处理上述退化条件，亟需一种鲁棒的关联与递推估计框架。
AI.method: 首先将图像域候选点转换为单位视线方向，在预测对齐切平面中表示局部偏差，并传播角测量噪声和站点位置不确定性至局部协方差模型。基于该表示，构造联合评估局部位置、伪速度和光度一致性的运动-光度五维归一化新息平方门控统计量。关联后，仅利用单帧位置和光度测量进行三维解耦卡尔曼更新。
AI.result: 在四组真实地面光学卫星观测序列上（两个静态场景和两个动态场景），正确关联率分别达到100.00%、100.00%、100.00%和85.86%，验证了框架在退化轨道先验和不精确站点位置信息下的关联可靠性提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效提升了退化轨道先验和不精确站点位置条件下的关联可靠性，同时保持了稳定的递推估计性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。改进方案：（1）将本文的视线方向转换与局部协方差传播方法引入遥感多目标跟踪（如视频卫星动目标检测），以处理平台姿态不确定性导致的配准误差；（2）五维运动-光度NIS门控统计量可直接迁移至遥感图像序列中的弱小目标关联，尤其是存在大量虚警或杂波点时的数据关联；（3）三维解耦卡尔曼更新可简化传统高维状态估计的计算负担，适用于星载平台资源受限的场景。

title: High-Resolution Soil Organic Carbon Content Mapping in Typical Lakeside Oases Using Sentinel-2 Images and Machine Learning Models
summary: Accurate high-resolution mapping of soil organic carbon (SOC) is essential for agricultural management and carbon pool assessment in arid lakeside oases, a fragile aquatic-terrestrial transition ecosystem. However, targeted high-precision SOC mapping for typical lakeside oases remains insufficient: existing models have poor adaptability to the highly fragmented oasis landscapes, and fine-resolution SOC spatial products for the representative Bosten Lake oasis are lacking. To address this inadequacy, we integrated Sentinel-2 imagery with topographic, bioclimatic, and spectral environmental covariates and developed four machine learning models (Random Forest, XGBoost, SVR with RBF kernel, Cubist) for SOC prediction, based on 153 topsoil samples (0–20 cm) collected via stratified random sampling in the study area. Model performance was validated through 5-fold cross-validation, the optimal model was selected for 10 m resolution SOC mapping, and dominant driving factors were identified via SHAP analysis. The results showed that SOC content in the study area ranged from 2.37 to 20.63 g·kg−1 (mean = 10.59 g·kg−1), with moderate spatial variability (CV = 34.86%). The Cubist model achieved the highest mapping accuracy (R2 = 0.8166, RMSE = 1.5812 g·kg−1, MAE = 0.9247 g·kg−1). The generated high-resolution SOC map clearly revealed a spatial pattern of high values in the eastern well-irrigated cropland and low values in bare and salinized areas at the oasis edge. The Bare Soil Index (BSI), surface roughness, and Normalized Difference Red Edge Index 1 (NDRE1) were the dominant factors controlling SOC spatial distribution. This study mitigates the inadequacy of high-precision SOC mapping in typical arid lakeside oases, and the proposed framework is readily applicable to other fragmented arid landscapes worldwide and provides reliable spatial data and a scalable technical framework for precision agriculture and sustainable land management in similar fragile ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本研究以博斯腾湖湖滨绿洲为研究区，融合Sentinel-2影像与地形、生物气候、光谱等多源环境变量，基于153个表层土壤样本，比较四种机器学习模型（RF、XGBoost、SVR、Cubist）进行10米分辨率土壤有机碳（SOC）制图。Cubist模型表现最优（R²=0.8166），裸土指数、地表粗糙度和红边归一化植被指数1是SOC空间分布的主导因子。
AI.motivation: 干旱区湖滨绿洲是脆弱的陆-水过渡生态系统，但现有SOC制图模型对高度破碎化的绿洲景观适应性差，且缺乏针对典型博斯腾湖绿洲的高分辨率SOC空间产品。
AI.method: 基于153个0-20 cm表层土样，拟合四种机器学习模型（RF、XGBoost、SVR-RBF、Cubist），输入变量包括Sentinel-2影像、地形、生物气候和光谱协变量，通过5折交叉验证评估模型，使用SHAP分析识别主导驱动因子，最终生成10米分辨率SOC空间分布图。
AI.result: SOC含量范围2.37-20.63 g·kg⁻¹，均值10.59 g·kg⁻¹，中等空间变异（CV=34.86%）。Cubist模型精度最优（R²=0.8166, RMSE=1.5812 g·kg⁻¹）。SOC高值区分布在东部井灌农田，低值区位于绿洲边缘的裸地和盐渍化区域。BSI、地表粗糙度和NDRE1为主要控制因子。
AI.conclusion: 该研究弥补了干旱区湖滨绿洲高精度SOC制图的不足，所提出的框架可推广至其他破碎化干旱景观，为精准农业和可持续土地管理提供可靠的空间数据与技术支撑。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：（1）可引入时序Sentinel-1 SAR数据提高对盐渍化和水分动态的探测能力；（2）增加GEDI或ICESat-2激光雷达数据以提升地表粗糙度和植被高度的估算精度；（3）采用深度学习模型（如CNN或Transformer）替代传统机器学习，以更好地捕捉破碎化景观中的空间异质性和非线性关系；（4）可扩展至多时相动态制图，监测SOC时空变化趋势；（5）SHAP分析与地理加权回归（GWR）结合，提升驱动因子的空间非平稳性解释能力。

title: Estimating Forest Volume and Forest Volume Change Using Random Forests and Sentinel-2 Data
summary: Accurate and precise estimation of forest volume and its changes are fundamental for sustainable forest management, resource assessment, and long-term inventory monitoring. Multi-temporal remotely sensed data provide spatial auxiliary information that can substantially increase the precision of estimates of volume and volume change obtained from probability-based field samples. However, methodological differences between indirect and direct change estimation approaches may lead to differences in variance estimation and uncertainty propagation. This study, therefore, compares forest volume and forest volume change estimation under design-based inference by integrating probability-sampled National Forest Inventory (NFI) data with multi-temporal Sentinel-2 auxiliary variables at 10 m and 20 m spatial resolutions, using the random forest (RF) prediction algorithm and both indirect and direct estimation approaches. Forest volume means are estimated for two inventory years, 2013 and 2023. For the indirect approach, simple expansion and model-assisted regression estimators are formulated separately for each year, and change is estimated as the difference between time-specific estimates. For the direct approach, plot-level change is used as the response variable, and model-assisted regression estimators are constructed using changes in auxiliary variables, with residual-based variance estimators. Random forest models using Sentinel-2 auxiliary data explained approximately 51–62% of the variation in forest volume, with RMSE values ranging from about 79 to 97 m3/ha. The 10 m resolution data produced slightly more precise predictions than the 20 m data, though the gain was small relative to the greater processing effort required. Model-assisted estimators using both 10 m and 20 m Sentinel-2 data produced substantially smaller standard errors than simple expansion estimators, with relative efficiency analysis indicating an approximately fivefold gain in efficiency. The direct and indirect model-assisted approaches produced similar estimates of volume change, although the direct approach resulted in smaller standard errors. Overall, remotely sensed auxiliary data primarily improved the precision of forest volume change estimates but not the magnitude of the estimated change.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了利用多时相Sentinel-2数据（10m和20m分辨率）和随机森林算法，通过间接法和直接法两种估计策略，在基于设计的推断框架下估算森林蓄积量及其变化的精度差异。结果表明：模型辅助估计器相比简单扩展估计器效率提升约5倍；直接法比间接法在变化估计中标准误更小；10m分辨率数据带来的精度增益有限。
AI.motivation: 森林蓄积量及其变化的精确估计对可持续森林管理、资源评估和长期监测至关重要。多时相遥感数据可显著提高基于概率样地的估计精度，但间接法与直接法在方差估计和不确定性传播上存在方法学差异，需要系统比较。
AI.method: 基于设计推断框架，将概率抽样的国家森林调查（NFI）数据与多时相Sentinel-2辅助变量（10m和20m分辨率）结合，使用随机森林（RF）预测算法。间接法分别对2013年和2023年构建简单扩展估计器和模型辅助回归估计器，变化量为两年估计之差；直接法以样地水平变化为响应变量，利用辅助变量变化构建模型辅助回归估计器，并采用残差方差估计器。
AI.result: 随机森林模型解释约51–62%的蓄积量变异，RMSE约79–97 m³/ha；10m分辨率预测精度略高于20m，但增益有限；模型辅助估计器标准误显著小于简单扩展估计器，效率提升约5倍；直接法与间接法在变化量估计上结果相似，但直接法标准误更小；遥感辅助数据主要提升了变化估计的精度，而非改变估计量的大小。
AI.conclusion: 多时相Sentinel-2辅助数据能有效提升森林蓄积量及其变化估计的精度，直接估计法在变化估计中具有更优的方差性能，10m和20m分辨率在实际应用中的精度差异不足以抵消高分辨率带来的处理成本。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该文方法与遥感交叉的方案包括：1）将直接法框架扩展到Landsat或SAR数据（如Sentinel-1、ALOS-2 PALSAR）的森林变化监测中，评估不同传感器对变化估计精度的贡献；2）将随机森林模型替换为深度学习模型（如3D-CNN或时序Transformer），以更好捕获遥感时序数据的时空特征，提高模型解释方差；3）将直接法应用于大范围森林碳储量变化估算，结合GEDI或ICESat-2激光雷达数据作为响应变量，提升变化估计的物理基础；4）在变化检测中引入空间自相关结构（如空间残差模型），进一步降低直接法估计器的标准误。

title: From Raw EO Data to AI-Ready Datasets: Lowering the Barrier to Geospatial Foundation Model Fine-Tuning
summary: Geospatial foundation models are a new frontier in artificial intelligence, designed to understand and analyze spatial data at scale. Trained on huge sets of EO data, these models can support a wide range of applications—from monitoring natural disasters to guiding urban development and tracking climate change. To this aim, researchers and practitioners need to fine-tune the foundation models for specific tasks, utilizing a relatively small amount of additional data. As a result, geospatial foundation models are reshaping how we observe, manage, and protect our planet. Fine-tuning a geospatial foundation model requires carefully curated training datasets that reflect specific regions, time periods, or tasks—such as detecting deforestation or mapping urban growth. Yet preparing these datasets is often labor-intensive, involving steps like selecting relevant imagery, aligning spatial formats, and generating accurate labels. In practice, this means that the effectiveness of GFMs hinges on the availability of AI-ready data. This bottleneck limits the accessibility and scalability of GFMs for scientific and operational applications. In this work, we introduce a software library designed to automate these preparatory steps, streamlining the transformation of geospatial datasets into consistent, high-quality inputs for GFM fine-tuning. By reducing technical overhead and ensuring data readiness, the library enables faster, more reliable, and more inclusive adaptation of foundation models to local environmental challenges and specialized domain needs.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个软件库，用于自动化地理空间基础模型微调前的数据处理流程，包括影像选择、空间格式对齐和标签生成等步骤，以解决数据准备的瓶颈问题，从而加速和简化GFM在环境监测、城市规划等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 地理空间基础模型（GFM）的微调需要精心整理的训练数据集，而数据准备过程耗时费力，包括影像筛选、空间格式对齐和标签生成等步骤，成为GFM可扩展性和可访问性的瓶颈，限制了其科学和业务应用。
AI.method: 开发了一个软件库，自动化地理空间数据集向GFM微调所需的一致、高质量输入的转换流程，涵盖数据筛选、空间格式对齐、标签生成等预处理步骤。
AI.result: 该库减少了技术开销，确保了数据就绪性，实现了更快、更可靠、更包容的基础模型适应过程。
AI.conclusion: 该软件库能够降低地理空间基础模型微调的技术门槛，使研究者能够更便捷地将GFM适应于本地环境挑战和特定领域需求。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。本文本身就是遥感领域的论文，属于遥感基础模型（GFM）的基础设施工具类工作。改进方案：(1) 可扩展支持多源遥感数据（如SAR、高光谱、LiDAR）的自动化预处理；(2) 集成主动学习策略，在数据准备阶段自动挑选最具信息量的样本，减少人工标注量；(3) 加入数据集质量评估模块，自动化检测标签噪声、空间错位等问题；(4) 支持增量式数据准备，便于持续学习和模型更新。

title: Prediction of Soil Salinity Parameters in the Songnen Plain Using FOD Processing and Machine Learning from Measured Hyperspectral Reflectance Under Different Surface Conditions
summary: Soil salinization severely restricts ecosystem stability and the sustainable development of agricultural productivity. However, current understanding of the spectral–salinity quantitative relationships under the influence of surface cracking still remains limited. To address this gap, this study collected hyperspectral reflectance data (350–2500 nm) from salt-affected soil in both cracked and uncracked surface conditions across the Songnen Plain, and applied fractional-order differentiation (FOD) processing with orders ranging from 0 to 2 and a step size of 0.1. Based on this, 14 types of FOD spectral indices were constructed, incorporating one-dimensional (1D), two-dimensional (2D), and three-dimensional (3D) structures. For each spectral index, the optimal fractional order and corresponding band combinations were first selected through Pearson correlation analysis for pH and EC under both surface conditions; subsequently, feature selection was performed using XGBoost-SHAP explainable analysis among the 14 optimal indices across different dimensions. Furthermore, the predictive performance of four modeling methods, including partial least squares regression (PLSR), Gaussian process regression (GPR), support vector regression (SVR), and random forest regression (RFR), was evaluated. The results showed that FOD transformations significantly enhanced correlations with EC and pH compared to raw reflectance. All prediction models demonstrated higher prediction accuracy under cracked surface conditions than uncracked surface conditions, indicating that desiccation cracks positively modulate spectral signals to enhance salinity information expression. Across different surface states, model performance generally followed the ranking: PLSR > GPR > SVR > RFR, with PLSR achieving the best predictions for EC and pH under cracked surfaces (R2 of 0.88 and 0.76, RMSE of 0.29 dS/m and 0.35). This study not only deepens the understanding of fractional-order spectral response mechanisms in saline–alkali soils but also provides methodological support for regional monitoring of soil salinization.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过收集松嫩平原盐碱土在开裂和未开裂两种表面条件下的高光谱反射数据（350-2500 nm），应用0-2阶（步长0.1）的分数阶微分处理，构建了14种包含一维、二维和三维结构的FOD光谱指数。通过Pearson相关分析筛选最优分数阶和波段组合，结合XGBoost-SHAP可解释分析进行特征选择，并比较了PLSR、GPR、SVR和RFR四种建模方法的预测性能。结果表明：FOD变换显著增强了与EC和pH的相关性；开裂表面条件下所有模型的预测精度均高于未开裂表面，说明干缩裂纹对光谱信号有正向调制作用；PLSR在开裂表面下对EC和pH的预测效果最佳（R²分别为0.88和0.76，RMSE分别为0.29 dS/m和0.35）。
AI.motivation: 当前对地表开裂影响下光谱-盐分定量关系的理解仍然有限，亟需探索裂纹如何调制光谱信号以增强盐分信息表达。
AI.method: 1) 采集盐碱土在开裂和未开裂表面条件下的高光谱数据（350-2500 nm）；2) 应用0-2阶（步长0.1）分数阶微分处理；3) 构建14种含1D、2D、3D结构的FOD光谱指数；4) Pearson相关分析筛选最优分数阶和波段组合；5) XGBoost-SHAP可解释分析进行特征选择；6) 比较PLSR、GPR、SVR、RFR四种模型的预测性能。
AI.result: FOD变换显著增强了与EC和pH的相关性；开裂表面的模型预测精度均高于未开裂表面；模型性能排序为PLSR > GPR > SVR > RFR；PLSR在开裂表面下预测EC和pH的R²分别达到0.88和0.76，RMSE分别为0.29 dS/m和0.35。
AI.conclusion: 干缩裂纹能正向调制光谱信号以增强盐分信息表达；研究深化了对盐碱土分数阶光谱响应机制的理解，为区域土壤盐渍化监测提供了方法支撑。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：1) 可引入更多维度的光谱指数结构（如4D张量）或深度学习自动特征提取方法替代传统指数构建；2) 可扩展到多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-2、Landsat）验证分数阶微分在实际卫星影像中的适用性；3) 可结合时间序列分析研究裂纹动态变化对盐分反演的影响；4) 可考虑土壤水分、有机质等干扰因素的协同去除策略；5) 可将XGBoost-SHAP筛选的特征作为先验知识引导物理模型或混合建模。

title: Estimation of Glacier Mass Balance in the Three-River Headwaters Region from 2000 to 2025 Based on ZiYuan-3 Satellite Data
summary: Under the background of global climate warming, glaciers in the Three-River Headwaters Region, as a crucial component of the “Asian Water Tower,” exert profound influences on regional water resource security and ecological stability through their mass balance variations. Due to the scarcity of in situ observations caused by the harsh high-altitude environment, long-term monitoring based on remote sensing techniques is urgently required. In this study, the geodetic method was employed, using the SRTM-C DEM acquired in 2000 as the reference, and recent glacier surface DEMs were generated from high-resolution ZiYuan-3 tri-stereo imagery obtained during 2024–2025. Through refined DEM co-registration, differencing, and systematic error corrections, the glacier mass balance in the Three-River Headwaters Region from 2000 to 2025 was systematically estimated. The results indicate that the glaciers in the study area exhibited an overall negative mass balance during the study period, with significant spatial heterogeneity. Among the sub-regions, the Lancang River source region experienced the most pronounced mass loss (−0.70 ± 0.07 m w.e. yr−1), whereas the Yellow River source region showed the lowest mass loss (−0.37 ± 0.09 m w.e. yr−1). Compared with earlier studies, glacier mass loss has accelerated in recent years and is closely associated with regional climatic characteristics. This study provides a scientific basis for understanding glacier changes and their hydrological and ecological impacts in the Three-River Headwaters Region.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用2000年SRTM-C DEM和2024-2025年资源三号三线阵立体影像，通过大地测量法估算三江源地区2000-2025年冰川物质平衡。结果表明该地区冰川整体呈负平衡，其中澜沧江源区物质损失最严重（-0.70 ± 0.07 m w.e. yr⁻¹），黄河源区损失最小（-0.37 ± 0.09 m w.e. yr⁻¹），近年冰川物质损失加速。
AI.motivation: 全球气候变暖背景下，三江源地区作为"亚洲水塔"的关键组成部分，其冰川物质平衡变化对区域水资源安全和生态稳定性有深远影响。由于高海拔恶劣环境导致实地观测数据稀缺，亟需基于遥感技术进行长期监测。
AI.method: 采用大地测量法，以2000年SRTM-C DEM为基准，利用2024-2025年获取的高分辨率资源三号三线阵立体影像生成近期冰川表面DEM，通过精细DEM配准、差分计算和系统误差校正，系统估算三江源地区2000-2025年冰川物质平衡。
AI.result: 三江源地区冰川在2000-2025年期间整体表现为负物质平衡，空间异质性显著。澜沧江源区物质损失最严重（-0.70 ± 0.07 m w.e. yr⁻¹），黄河源区损失最小（-0.37 ± 0.09 m w.e. yr⁻¹）。与早期研究相比，近年冰川物质损失加速，且与区域气候特征密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为理解三江源地区冰川变化及其水文和生态影响提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文本身即为遥感应用研究，可在以下方面改进：(1) 增加多源DEM数据融合（如ICESat-2、TanDEM-X）以提高时间分辨率和覆盖连续性；(2) 引入深度学习或物理模型对DEM配准系统误差进行更精细校正；(3) 结合Sentinel-2/Landsat等光学遥感数据反演的冰川流速，分析冰川动态对物质平衡的影响机制；(4) 融合GRACE重力卫星数据验证物质平衡估算结果；(5) 引入气候再分析数据（如ERA5-Land）建立冰川物质平衡与气候因子的定量归因模型。

title: Long-Term Monitoring of Saline–Alkaline Land Converted to Paddy Fields Using a Time-Series Change Detection Algorithm
summary: Saline–alkaline land serves as a potential arable land reserve for augmenting agricultural productivity and safeguarding food security. However, long-term monitoring of saline–alkaline land conversion remains challenging because of vegetation recovery, surface changes, hydrological modification, and agricultural phenology. Compared with CCDC and LandTrendr, the proposed MK-based framework detects conversion occurrence and timing while reducing dependence on dense observations, parameter tuning, and annual classification. This study examines the spatiotemporal dynamics of saline–alkaline land converted into paddies in Da’an City, utilizing Landsat time-series data (2007–2021) from the Google Earth Engine (GEE) platform. The analysis employed Mann–Kendall (MK) trend and mutation tests to monitor conversion processes and analyze spatiotemporal dynamics. Point-biserial correlation analysis was applied to evaluate the sensitivity of various remote sensing indices in detecting land conversion. The top fifteen indices, including the Land Surface Water Index (LSWI), Salinity Index 4 (SI4), and Salinity Index 5 (SI5), demonstrated strong correlations (|r| = 0.788–0.885) and significant pre- and post-conversion spectral differences (p < 0.01). Validation via confusion matrix confirmed that the June SI5 index attained the highest detection accuracy (overall accuracy: 94.15%; Kappa coefficient: 0.86), supporting the MK trend test’s efficacy in monitoring conversion processes. The MK mutation test achieved 80.36% temporal accuracy in determining conversion timing. The spatiotemporal analyses identified heterogeneity in saline–alkaline land conversion patterns. Spatially, large contiguous paddy fields dominated the eastern region, whereas fragmented conversion characterized the west, with minimal activity in the central zone. Temporally, the conversion area expanded rapidly before 2015 and then gradually declined, reaching a cumulative converted area of 276.29 km2 by 2021. This study elucidates spatiotemporal conversion dynamics to guide sustainable land use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Mann-Kendall(MK)的框架，利用Landsat时间序列数据(2007-2021)监测盐碱地转水田的时空动态。相比CCDC和LandTrendr，该方法减少了对密集观测和参数调整的依赖。验证表明，六月SI5指数检测精度最高(总体精度94.15%，Kappa=0.86)，MK突变检验时间精度达80.36%。研究揭示了大安市盐碱地转化的时空异质性，截至2021年累计转化面积276.29 km²。
AI.motivation: 盐碱地是可耕地的重要储备资源，但植被恢复、地表变化、水文改造和农业物候等因素使得盐碱地转化的长期监测面临挑战。现有方法如CCDC和LandTrendr对密集观测、参数调整和年度分类依赖较强，需要开发更高效的监测框架。
AI.method: 基于GEE平台获取Landsat时间序列数据(2007-2021)，采用Mann-Kendall趋势检验和突变检验监测盐碱地转水田的转化过程；利用点二列相关分析评估15种遥感指数的敏感性；通过混淆矩阵验证不同指数和月份的检测精度。
AI.result: LSWI、SI4、SI5等15种指数与土地转化强相关(|r|=0.788-0.885)，转化前后光谱差异显著(p<0.01)；六月SI5指数检测精度最高(总体精度94.15%，Kappa=0.86)；MK突变检验时间精度80.36%；空间上东部以大面积连片水田为主、西部呈碎片化转化、中部活动较少；时间上2015年前快速扩张后逐步下降，2021年累计转化面积276.29 km²。
AI.conclusion: 基于MK的框架能有效监测盐碱地转水田的转化过程及时空动态，SI5指数在六月具有最佳检测效果，研究成果可为可持续土地利用提供科学指导。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。改进方案：(1)可引入多源遥感数据(Sentinel-2、高分系列)提高时空分辨率，增强对小规模碎片化转化的检测能力；(2)结合深度学习(如LSTM、Transformer)对时间序列进行建模，提升转化时间点的预测精度；(3)将MK框架与物候特征相结合，区分盐碱地转化与其他土地利用变化(如湿地退化)；(4)引入SAR数据(如Sentinel-1)克服云覆盖问题，提高多雨地区监测的连续性；(5)扩展至盐碱地转化为其他土地利用类型(如旱田、建设用地)的监测。

title: Mapping Building Construction Year from Landsat in Data-Scarce, Cloud-Prone Regions: A Parsimonious Spatial Triage Tool for Physical Vulnerability Screening
summary: Assessing urban resilience requires accurate data on building age as a temporal proxy associated with structural vulnerability, yet persistent cloud cover and rapid development constrain data availability in tropical and subtropical regions. We propose a computationally efficient framework that prioritizes annual data integrity over monthly granularity to map building construction years. By combining annual cloud-free Landsat NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) composites with open-source building footprints, the framework utilizes a Temporal Template Matching (TTM) algorithm to detect the distinct “vegetation-to-built” transition signal. Evaluated across two dynamic and heavily cloud-contaminated metropolitan areas—Shenzhen, China, and Hanoi, Vietnam—this approach achieves a high producer’s accuracy; furthermore, in Shenzhen, where a monthly comparative analysis was conducted, it outperforms a noise-sensitive monthly LandTrendr-based baseline by a factor of nearly 1.8. Our findings demonstrate that under persistent cloud contamination, a coarser but consistent annual composite provides a more reliable signal than finer-grained alternatives. This scalable methodology generates critical building-age datasets, offering foundational structural intelligence for potential inputs into seismic risk modeling and resilient urban planning in rapid-growth and resource-constrained regions.

AI.tldr: 针对云覆盖和快速城市化导致建筑年代数据缺失的问题，提出一种利用年度无云Landsat NDVI合成影像与开源建筑足迹，结合时间模板匹配（TTM）算法检测“植被到建筑”转变信号，从而高效绘制建筑建造年份的框架。在深圳和河内两个多云城市评估，精度高，且在深圳比基于LandTrendr的月度基线方法性能提升约1.8倍。
AI.motivation: 城市韧性评估需要准确的建筑年代数据作为结构脆弱性的时间代理，但热带和亚热带地区由于持续云覆盖和快速开发，数据可用性受限。
AI.method: 提出一种优先保证年度数据完整性而非月度精细度的计算高效框架，结合年度无云Landsat NDVI合成影像与开源建筑足迹，利用时间模板匹配（TTM）算法检测“植被到建筑”转变信号来映射建筑建造年份。
AI.result: 在深圳（中国）和河内（越南）两个多云动态大都市区评估，实现了高生产者精度；在深圳的月度对比分析中，性能比基于LandTrendr的月度基线方法提升约1.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 在持续云污染条件下，较粗略但一致的年度合成影像比更细粒度的替代方案提供更可靠的信号。该方法可扩展生成关键建筑年代数据集，为地震风险建模和韧性城市规划提供基础结构信息。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：（1）可引入多源遥感数据（如Sentinel-1 SAR）以进一步克服云污染问题，增强在极端多云区域的适用性；（2）TTM算法可结合深度学习时序分类方法，提升复杂城市形态下“植被到建筑”转变检测的鲁棒性；（3）可扩展至建筑类型分类（如区分混凝土、钢结构等），为结构脆弱性评估提供更精细输入；（4）可结合夜间灯光数据或POI数据验证建筑年代映射结果，降低虚假检测率。

title: High-Order Nonlinear Correction for Spaceborne Fourier Transform Spectrometers
summary: Infrared Fourier transform spectrometers using interferometric spectroscopy are widely used in space remote sensing owing to their high spectral resolution and sensitivity. We investigated the distorted spectral characteristics introduced by nonlinear errors of different orders through simulation for infrared detectors with strong nonlinear effects. A high-order nonlinear correction scheme was proposed based on two iterative correction methods for in-band and out-of-band spectra. Further, the effects of second-order, third-order, in-band, and out-of-band correction methods were compared using prelaunch radiometric calibration experimental data from the DQ-2 satellite infrared hyperspectral atmospheric composition sounder. The results showed that the third-order in-band correction scheme performed the best, while various other correction schemes also effectively reduced nonlinear errors. The maximum average deviation was 0.18–0.25 K for the long-wave band and 0.11–0.19 K for the mid-wave band in the temperature range of 230–300 K. According to the correction evaluation and methods comparison, the proposed method is appropriate for nonlinearity detectors to improve radiometric calibration accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对红外傅里叶变换光谱仪中探测器非线性误差导致的光谱畸变问题，提出了一种基于迭代修正的高阶非线性校正方案，并通过DQ-2卫星红外高光谱大气成分探测器的发射前辐射定标实验数据验证了方案有效性，其中三阶带内校正效果最优，可将长波波段平均偏差控制在0.18–0.25 K，中波波段控制在0.11–0.19 K。
AI.motivation: 红外傅里叶变换光谱仪在空间遥感中广泛应用，但其红外探测器存在强非线性效应，会引入不同阶次的非线性误差，导致光谱畸变，影响辐射定标精度。现有校正方法对高阶非线性误差的处理不足，亟需提出更有效的校正方案。
AI.method: 通过仿真分析不同阶次非线性误差引入的畸变光谱特性；提出基于两种迭代修正方法的高阶非线性校正方案，分别针对带内和带外光谱进行校正；利用DQ-2卫星红外高光谱大气成分探测器的发射前辐射定标实验数据，对比二阶、三阶、带内、带外等多种校正方案的性能。
AI.result: 三阶带内校正方案性能最优；各校正方案均能有效降低非线性误差；在230–300 K温度范围内，长波波段最大平均偏差为0.18–0.25 K，中波波段为0.11–0.19 K。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的高阶非线性迭代校正方案适用于非线性探测器，能够有效提升辐射定标精度。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该文本身即为遥感领域（星载红外高光谱大气成分探测）的核心研究。改进方向：1) 可将该校正方案推广至其他星载傅里叶变换光谱仪（如风云系列、GOSAT等）的非线性校正；2) 可结合深度学习方法替代迭代修正，提高校正效率与泛化能力；3) 可进一步考虑时间退化因素，建立非线性参数的在线自适应校正模型；4) 可将带内/带外联合校正策略应用于多光谱、超光谱遥感成像仪的辐射定标中。

title: A Weighted Image-Point-Measurement Method of Laser Altimetry Points for Improving Laser-Altimetry-Data-Assisted Positioning Accuracy of Small-Satellite Images
summary: For small-satellite imagery, traditional image points derived from the direct back-projection of laser altimetry points onto the imagery often exhibit deviations of tens of pixels or more, owing to the relatively limited attitude and orbit determination accuracy of small-satellite platforms. Moreover, the diversity of imaging sensors, variations in image resolution, and inherently weak image geometric configurations further complicate the accurate acquisition of image-space coordinates for laser altimetry points. To facilitate the application of laser altimetry data for geometric positioning across multi-satellite, multi-sensor, and multi-resolution small-satellite imagery, this study proposes a measurement method for laser altimetry points tailored to small-satellite images and establishes a combined geometric positioning model that integrates virtual control points, laser altimetry points, and image-matching tie points. The framework comprises four key procedural components: (1) an image-point-measurement strategy for laser altimetry points; (2) the construction of a laser altimetry data-assisted geometric positioning model for small-satellite imagery; (3) the solution of the geometric positioning model using a total least squares approach based on the partial-EIV (errors-in-variables) models; and (4) a comprehensive accuracy assessment conducted under multiple image-combination scenarios, including single-satellite single-stereo, single-satellite multi-stereo, dual-satellite single-stereo, and multi-satellite multi-stereo imagery configurations. Experimental validation is carried out using Jilin-1 small-satellite panchromatic images (KF01A, GF02A, and GF02B) acquired over the Henan region of China. The experimental results demonstrate that, with the laser altimetry point-measurement method and the combined geometric positioning model, the vertical positioning accuracy is substantially improved across all tested image-combination scenarios. These findings further confirm the capability in enhancing the vertical geometric positioning performance of stereoscopic small-satellite imagery characterized by multi-satellite platforms, multi-sensors, and multi-resolutions over terrain conditions similar to those tested.

AI.tldr: 针对小卫星影像中激光测高点反投偏差大、多平台多传感器几何定位困难的问题，提出了一套激光测高点量测方法及联合虚拟控制点、激光测高点和匹配连接点的组合几何定位模型，采用Partial-EIV总体最小二乘求解。在吉林一号多卫星多分辨率影像上验证，有效提升了高程定位精度。
AI.motivation: 小卫星平台姿轨测定精度有限，导致激光测高点直接反投到影像上存在数十像素偏差；且多卫星、多传感器、多分辨率的影像几何构型弱，难以准确获取激光测高点影像坐标，限制了激光测高数据在小卫星影像几何定位中的应用。
AI.method: (1) 提出针对小卫星影像的激光测高点像点量测策略；(2) 构建联合虚拟控制点、激光测高点与影像匹配连接点的辅助几何定位模型；(3) 采用基于Partial-EIV模型的总体最小二乘法求解；(4) 在单星单立体、单星多立体、双星单立体、多星多立体四种组合场景下进行精度评估。使用吉林一号KF01A、GF02A、GF02B全色影像进行验证。
AI.result: 在所有测试的影像组合场景下，采用所提出的激光测高点量测方法和组合几何定位模型后，高程定位精度均得到显著提升，验证了该方法对多平台、多传感器、多分辨率小卫星立体影像高程定位性能的增强能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的激光测高点量测方法和联合几何定位模型有效克服了小卫星平台姿轨精度低、影像多样性强带来的几何定位困难，显著提升了多场景下的小卫星立体影像高程定位精度。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。改进方案：(1) 可进一步引入ICESat-2或高分七号等更高精度的星载激光测高数据（如ATLAS光子计数数据），替代或补充当前使用的激光测高点，提升控制源精度；(2) 将Partial-EIV总体最小二乘模型推广到无控或稀少控制区域，结合卫星影像与激光测高点联合区域网平差；(3) 可引入深度学习特征匹配方法优化激光测高点像点量测策略，提升在弱纹理或大畸变区域的量测鲁棒性；(4) 考虑将时序InSAR或SAR数据与该模型融合，实现光学-SAR-激光测高多源联合定位。

title: Glacier Boundary Extraction over the Tibetan Plateau Using a Double Random Forest Model with Multi-Temporal Sentinel-1/2 Data
summary: Glacier boundary extraction on the Tibetan Plateau (TP) faces persistent challenges due to rugged terrain, seasonal snow, extensive debris cover, and topographic shadows. Traditional methods utilizing single-source or single-temporal data often yield limited accuracy. Thus, we propose an automated Double Random Forest (Double-RF) framework integrating single- and multi-temporal features from Sentinel-1 (SAR) and Sentinel-2 (Optical) data within the Google Earth Engine. We established a multidimensional feature space comprising spectral, textural, polarimetric, and topographic attributes. Feature optimization was performed using importance metrics and out-of-bag (OOB) error. A hierarchical classification strategy was employed: the first RF identifies clean glaciers and glaciers in shadow, while the second RF executes refined boundary extraction of debris-covered glaciers to mitigate spectral confusion. The results indicate that the Double-RF method significantly achieves an overall accuracy exceeding 0.84 across all sub-basins and reaching above 0.95 at best. The derived glacier inventory reveals a distinct spatial pattern: higher concentrations in the western and peripheral regions compared to the eastern and interior TP. Glaciers are predominantly distributed on shaded aspects with gentle-to-moderate slopes, highlighting the combined influence of climatic gradients and topographic controls. This multi-source, multi-temporal fusion strategy provides a robust methodological foundation for long-term glacier monitoring over the TP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于双随机森林（Double-RF）的自动化框架，融合Sentinel-1 SAR和Sentinel-2光学数据的单时相与多时相特征，在Google Earth Engine上实现了青藏高原高精度冰川边界提取，总体精度超过0.84，最佳可达0.95以上。
AI.motivation: 青藏高原地形崎岖、季节性积雪、广泛表碛覆盖和地形阴影等因素导致传统单源或单时相数据方法提取冰川边界精度有限，亟需一种多源多时相融合的自动化高精度提取方法。
AI.method: 构建包含光谱、纹理、极化和地形属性的多维特征空间，利用特征重要性指标和袋外误差进行特征优化；采用分层分类策略，第一层RF识别清洁冰川和阴影冰川，第二层RF对表碛覆盖冰川进行精细化边界提取以缓解光谱混淆。
AI.result: 所有子流域总体精度超过0.84，最佳达0.95以上；冰川清单显示青藏高原西部和边缘区域冰川浓度高于东部和内部区域，冰川主要分布在高海拔阴坡且坡度平缓至中等的地带。
AI.conclusion: 该多源多时相融合策略为青藏高原长期冰川监测提供了稳健的方法基础，揭示了气候梯度和地形控制的综合影响。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。这是一篇遥感论文，改进方案：（1）引入深度学习模型（如U-Net、Transformer）替代RF作为分类器，进一步提升边界精细度；（2）增加Landsat或ASTER热红外波段辅助区分表碛冰川与周围岩石；（3）结合ICESat-2或TanDEM-X测高数据验证高程变化与边界变化的协同关系。

title: Scale-Adaptive Infrared UAV Detection Under Fast Motion and Zooming
summary: Infrared UAV detection plays a crucial role in both security surveillance and military applications.
